authors_text: Daniel Sobotka,Michael Ebner,Ernst Schwartz,Karl-Heinz Nenning,Athena Taymourtash,Tom Vercauteren,Sebastien Ourselin,Gregor Kasprian,Daniela Prayer,Georg Langs,Roxane Licandro
title: Motion Correction and Volumetric Reconstruction for Fetal Functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging Data
title_zh: 胎儿功能磁共振成像数据的运动校正和体积重建
abstract: Motion correction is an essential preprocessing step in functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging (fMRI) of the fetal brain with the aim to remove artifacts caused by fetal movement and maternal breathing and consequently to suppress erroneous signal correlations. Current motion correction approaches for fetal fMRI choose a single 3D volume from a specific acquisition timepoint with least motion artefacts as reference volume, and perform interpolation for the reconstruction of the motion corrected time series. The results can suffer, if no low-motion frame is available, and if reconstruction does not exploit any assumptions about the continuity of the fMRI signal. Here, we propose a novel framework, which estimates a high-resolution reference volume by using outlier-robust motion correction, and by utilizing Huber L2 regularization for intra-stack volumetric reconstruction of the motion-corrected fetal brain fMRI. We performed an extensive parameter study to investigate the effectiveness of motion estimation and present in this work benchmark metrics to quantify the effect of motion correction and regularised volumetric reconstruction approaches on functional connectivity computations. We demonstrate the proposed framework's ability to improve functional connectivity estimates, reproducibility and signal interpretability, which is clinically highly desirable for the establishment of prognostic noninvasive imaging biomarkers. The motion correction and volumetric reconstruction framework is made available as an open-source package of NiftyMIC.
summary: Motion correction is an essential preprocessing step in functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging (fMRI) of the fetal brain with the aim to remove artifacts caused by fetal movement and maternal breathing and consequently to suppress erroneous signal correlations. Current motion correction approaches for fetal fMRI choose a single 3D volume from a specific acquisition timepoint with least motion artefacts as reference volume, and perform interpolation for the reconstruction of the motion corrected time series. The results can suffer, if no low-motion frame is available, and if reconstruction does not exploit any assumptions about the continuity of the fMRI signal. Here, we propose a novel framework, which estimates a high-resolution reference volume by using outlier-robust motion correction, and by utilizing Huber L2 regularization for intra-stack volumetric reconstruction of the motion-corrected fetal brain fMRI. We performed an extensive parameter study to investigate the effectiveness of motion estimation and present in this work benchmark metrics to quantify the effect of motion correction and regularised volumetric reconstruction approaches on functional connectivity computations. We demonstrate the proposed framework's ability to improve functional connectivity estimates, reproducibility and signal interpretability, which is clinically highly desirable for the establishment of prognostic noninvasive imaging biomarkers. The motion correction and volumetric reconstruction framework is made available as an open-source package of NiftyMIC.
abstract_zh: 运动校正是胎儿大脑功能磁共振成像 (fMRI) 中重要的预处理步骤，旨在消除胎儿运动和母亲呼吸引起的伪影，从而抑制错误的信号相关性。当前胎儿 fMRI 的运动校正方法从特定采集时间点选择具有最少运动伪影的单个 3D 体积作为参考体积，并执行插值以重建运动校正时间序列。如果没有可用的低运动帧，并且重建没有利用有关 fMRI 信号连续性的任何假设，结果可能会受到影响。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，它通过使用异常鲁棒运动校正来估计高分辨率参考体积，并利用 Huber L2 正则化对运动校正的胎儿大脑 fMRI 进行堆栈内体积重建。我们进行了广泛的参数研究，以调查运动估计的有效性，并在这项工作中提出基准指标，以量化运动校正和正则化体积重建方法对功能连接计算的影响。我们证明了所提出的框架能够改善功能连接估计、再现性和信号可解释性，这对于建立预后非侵入性成像生物标志物在临床上是非常理想的。运动校正和体积重建框架作为 NiftyMIC 的开源包提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于胎儿功能磁共振成像（fMRI）数据的运动校正和容积重建的新框架。
AI.motivation: 现有胎儿fMRI运动校正方法依赖单一低运动帧作为参考体积，存在无低运动帧时效果不佳及未利用fMRI信号连续性假设的问题。
AI.method: 采用鲁棒运动校正估计高分辨率参考体积，并利用Huber L2正则化进行容积重建，通过参数研究验证方法有效性并建立基准指标。
AI.result: 该框架提升了功能连接性估计的准确性、可重复性及信号可解释性，为临床非侵入性影像生物标志物研究提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 新框架通过改进运动校正与重建方法，显著优化了胎儿fMRI分析，开源工具NiftyMIC的发布促进了相关研究应用。

search_text: Motion Correction and Volumetric Reconstruction for Fetal Functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging Data 胎儿功能磁共振成像数据的运动校正和体积重建 Motion correction is an essential preprocessing step in functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging (fMRI) of the fetal brain with the aim to remove artifacts caused by fetal movement and maternal breathing and consequently to suppress erroneous signal correlations. Current motion correction approaches for fetal fMRI choose a single 3D volume from a specific acquisition timepoint with least motion artefacts as reference volume, and perform interpolation for the reconstruction of the motion corrected time series. The results can suffer, if no low-motion frame is available, and if reconstruction does not exploit any assumptions about the continuity of the fMRI signal. Here, we propose a novel framework, which estimates a high-resolution reference volume by using outlier-robust motion correction, and by utilizing Huber L2 regularization for intra-stack volumetric reconstruction of the motion-corrected fetal brain fMRI. We performed an extensive parameter study to investigate the effectiveness of motion estimation and present in this work benchmark metrics to quantify the effect of motion correction and regularised volumetric reconstruction approaches on functional connectivity computations. We demonstrate the proposed framework's ability to improve functional connectivity estimates, reproducibility and signal interpretability, which is clinically highly desirable for the establishment of prognostic noninvasive imaging biomarkers. The motion correction and volumetric reconstruction framework is made available as an open-source package of NiftyMIC. 运动校正是胎儿大脑功能磁共振成像 (fMRI) 中重要的预处理步骤，旨在消除胎儿运动和母亲呼吸引起的伪影，从而抑制错误的信号相关性。当前胎儿 fMRI 的运动校正方法从特定采集时间点选择具有最少运动伪影的单个 3D 体积作为参考体积，并执行插值以重建运动校正时间序列。如果没有可用的低运动帧，并且重建没有利用有关 fMRI 信号连续性的任何假设，结果可能会受到影响。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，它通过使用异常鲁棒运动校正来估计高分辨率参考体积，并利用 Huber L2 正则化对运动校正的胎儿大脑 fMRI 进行堆栈内体积重建。我们进行了广泛的参数研究，以调查运动估计的有效性，并在这项工作中提出基准指标，以量化运动校正和正则化体积重建方法对功能连接计算的影响。我们证明了所提出的框架能够改善功能连接估计、再现性和信号可解释性，这对于建立预后非侵入性成像生物标志物在临床上是非常理想的。运动校正和体积重建框架作为 NiftyMIC 的开源包提供。 本文提出了一种用于胎儿功能磁共振成像（fMRI）数据的运动校正和容积重建的新框架。 Daniel Sobotka,Michael Ebner,Ernst Schwartz,Karl-Heinz Nenning,Athena Taymourtash,Tom Vercauteren,Sebastien Ourselin,Gregor Kasprian,Daniela Prayer,Georg Langs,Roxane Licandro cs.CV

authors_text: Buddhika Laknath Semage,Thommen George Karimpanal,Santu Rana,Svetha Venkatesh
title: Uncertainty Aware System Identification with Universal Policies
title_zh: 具有通用策略的不确定性感知系统识别
abstract: Sim2real transfer is primarily concerned with transferring policies trained in simulation to potentially noisy real world environments. A common problem associated with sim2real transfer is estimating the real-world environmental parameters to ground the simulated environment to. Although existing methods such as Domain Randomisation (DR) can produce robust policies by sampling from a distribution of parameters during training, there is no established method for identifying the parameters of the corresponding distribution for a given real-world setting. In this work, we propose Uncertainty-aware policy search (UncAPS), where we use Universal Policy Network (UPN) to store simulation-trained task-specific policies across the full range of environmental parameters and then subsequently employ robust Bayesian optimisation to craft robust policies for the given environment by combining relevant UPN policies in a DR like fashion. Such policy-driven grounding is expected to be more efficient as it estimates only task-relevant sets of parameters. Further, we also account for the estimation uncertainties in the search process to produce policies that are robust against both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties. We empirically evaluate our approach in a range of noisy, continuous control environments, and show its improved performance compared to competing baselines.
summary: Sim2real transfer is primarily concerned with transferring policies trained in simulation to potentially noisy real world environments. A common problem associated with sim2real transfer is estimating the real-world environmental parameters to ground the simulated environment to. Although existing methods such as Domain Randomisation (DR) can produce robust policies by sampling from a distribution of parameters during training, there is no established method for identifying the parameters of the corresponding distribution for a given real-world setting. In this work, we propose Uncertainty-aware policy search (UncAPS), where we use Universal Policy Network (UPN) to store simulation-trained task-specific policies across the full range of environmental parameters and then subsequently employ robust Bayesian optimisation to craft robust policies for the given environment by combining relevant UPN policies in a DR like fashion. Such policy-driven grounding is expected to be more efficient as it estimates only task-relevant sets of parameters. Further, we also account for the estimation uncertainties in the search process to produce policies that are robust against both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties. We empirically evaluate our approach in a range of noisy, continuous control environments, and show its improved performance compared to competing baselines.
abstract_zh: Sim2real 传输主要涉及将模拟训练的策略传输到潜在嘈杂的现实世界环境。与 sim2real 传输相关的一个常见问题是估计真实环境参数以将模拟环境接地。尽管域随机化 (DR) 等现有方法可以通过在训练期间从参数分布中采样来生成稳健的策略，但没有既定的方法来识别给定现实世界设置的相应分布的参数。在这项工作中，我们提出了不确定性感知策略搜索（UncAPS），其中我们使用通用策略网络（UPN）来存储跨整个环境参数的模拟训练的特定任务策略，然后采用强大的贝叶斯优化，通过以类似 DR 的方式组合相关 UPN 策略，为给定环境制定稳健的策略。这种政策驱动的基础预计会更加有效，因为它只估计与任务相关的参数集。此外，我们还考虑了搜索过程中的估计不确定性，以制定针对任意不确定性和认知不确定性的稳健策略。我们在一系列嘈杂、连续的控制环境中根据经验评估了我们的方法，并展示了与竞争基线相比其改进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UncAPS的不确定性感知系统识别方法，通过结合通用策略网络和贝叶斯优化，提升模拟到现实环境的策略迁移效率。
AI.motivation: 现有领域随机化方法无法有效识别实际环境参数分布，导致策略迁移效率低下且难以应对现实环境中的噪声和不确定性。
AI.method: 使用通用策略网络（UPN）存储全参数范围的任务策略，并通过鲁棒贝叶斯优化结合相关UPN策略，同时考虑任务相关参数集的估计不确定性。
AI.result: 在多个噪声连续控制环境中实验证明，该方法相比基线方法具有更优的策略迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过策略驱动的参数估计和不确定性建模，UncAPS在提升迁移效率和鲁棒性方面展现出显著优势。

authors_text: Buddhika Laknath Semage,Thommen George Karimpanal,Santu Rana,Svetha Venkatesh
title: Fast Model-based Policy Search for Universal Policy Networks
title_zh: 通用策略网络的基于模型的快速策略搜索
abstract: Adapting an agent's behaviour to new environments has been one of the primary focus areas of physics based reinforcement learning. Although recent approaches such as universal policy networks partially address this issue by enabling the storage of multiple policies trained in simulation on a wide range of dynamic/latent factors, efficiently identifying the most appropriate policy for a given environment remains a challenge. In this work, we propose a Gaussian Process-based prior learned in simulation, that captures the likely performance of a policy when transferred to a previously unseen environment. We integrate this prior with a Bayesian Optimisation-based policy search process to improve the efficiency of identifying the most appropriate policy from the universal policy network. We empirically evaluate our approach in a range of continuous and discrete control environments, and show that it outperforms other competing baselines.
summary: Adapting an agent's behaviour to new environments has been one of the primary focus areas of physics based reinforcement learning. Although recent approaches such as universal policy networks partially address this issue by enabling the storage of multiple policies trained in simulation on a wide range of dynamic/latent factors, efficiently identifying the most appropriate policy for a given environment remains a challenge. In this work, we propose a Gaussian Process-based prior learned in simulation, that captures the likely performance of a policy when transferred to a previously unseen environment. We integrate this prior with a Bayesian Optimisation-based policy search process to improve the efficiency of identifying the most appropriate policy from the universal policy network. We empirically evaluate our approach in a range of continuous and discrete control environments, and show that it outperforms other competing baselines.
abstract_zh: 使代理的行为适应新环境一直是基于物理的强化学习的主要关注领域之一。尽管通用策略网络等最新方法通过存储在各种动态/潜在因素的模拟中训练的多个策略来部分解决这个问题，但有效地识别给定环境的最合适的策略仍然是一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于高斯过程的模拟先验学习，它可以捕获策略在转移到以前未见过的环境时可能的性能。我们将此先验与基于贝叶斯优化的策略搜索过程相结合，以提高从通用策略网络中识别最合适策略的效率。我们在一系列连续和离散控制环境中对我们的方法进行了实证评估，并表明它优于其他竞争基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯过程先验和贝叶斯优化的方法，用于提高通用策略网络在新环境中快速选择最佳策略的效率。
AI.motivation: 通用策略网络虽能存储多种模拟训练的策略，但如何高效识别特定环境下的最佳策略仍是挑战。
AI.method: 通过模拟学习高斯过程先验模型预测策略性能，并结合贝叶斯优化进行策略搜索。
AI.result: 在多种连续和离散控制环境中实验证明，该方法优于其他基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了通用策略网络在未知环境中的策略选择效率。

search_text: Fast Model-based Policy Search for Universal Policy Networks 通用策略网络的基于模型的快速策略搜索 Adapting an agent's behaviour to new environments has been one of the primary focus areas of physics based reinforcement learning. Although recent approaches such as universal policy networks partially address this issue by enabling the storage of multiple policies trained in simulation on a wide range of dynamic/latent factors, efficiently identifying the most appropriate policy for a given environment remains a challenge. In this work, we propose a Gaussian Process-based prior learned in simulation, that captures the likely performance of a policy when transferred to a previously unseen environment. We integrate this prior with a Bayesian Optimisation-based policy search process to improve the efficiency of identifying the most appropriate policy from the universal policy network. We empirically evaluate our approach in a range of continuous and discrete control environments, and show that it outperforms other competing baselines. 使代理的行为适应新环境一直是基于物理的强化学习的主要关注领域之一。尽管通用策略网络等最新方法通过存储在各种动态/潜在因素的模拟中训练的多个策略来部分解决这个问题，但有效地识别给定环境的最合适的策略仍然是一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于高斯过程的模拟先验学习，它可以捕获策略在转移到以前未见过的环境时可能的性能。我们将此先验与基于贝叶斯优化的策略搜索过程相结合，以提高从通用策略网络中识别最合适策略的效率。我们在一系列连续和离散控制环境中对我们的方法进行了实证评估，并表明它优于其他竞争基线。 本文提出一种基于高斯过程先验和贝叶斯优化的方法，用于提高通用策略网络在新环境中快速选择最佳策略的效率。 Buddhika Laknath Semage,Thommen George Karimpanal,Santu Rana,Svetha Venkatesh cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

title: Abstraction for Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习的抽象
abstract: We characterise the problem of abstraction in the context of deep reinforcement learning. Various well established approaches to analogical reasoning and associative memory might be brought to bear on this issue, but they present difficulties because of the need for end-to-end differentiability. We review developments in AI and machine learning that could facilitate their adoption.
summary: We characterise the problem of abstraction in the context of deep reinforcement learning. Various well established approaches to analogical reasoning and associative memory might be brought to bear on this issue, but they present difficulties because of the need for end-to-end differentiability. We review developments in AI and machine learning that could facilitate their adoption.
abstract_zh: 我们在深度强化学习的背景下描述抽象问题。各种成熟的类比推理和联想记忆方法可能适用于这个问题，但由于需要端到端的可微性，它们带来了困难。我们回顾了人工智能和机器学习的发展，以促进它们的采用。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在深度强化学习中如何应用抽象方法，并分析了现有类比推理和联想记忆技术面临的端到端可微分挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有类比推理和联想记忆方法难以直接应用于深度强化学习，因其缺乏端到端可微分性，限制了复杂任务的处理能力。
AI.method: 通过回顾AI与机器学习领域的相关进展，分析如何调整现有技术以满足深度强化学习对可微分性的需求。
AI.result: 提出可能的解决方案方向，但未提供具体实验验证，侧重理论探讨与技术可行性分析。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法需结合深度学习特性进行改进，未来研究应聚焦于可微分抽象机制的设计与实现。

title: SafePicking: Learning Safe Object Extraction via Object-Level Mapping
title_zh: SafePicking：通过对象级映射学习安全对象提取
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
abstract: Robots need object-level scene understanding to manipulate objects while reasoning about contact, support, and occlusion among objects. Given a pile of objects, object recognition and reconstruction can identify the boundary of object instances, giving important cues as to how the objects form and support the pile. In this work, we present a system, SafePicking, that integrates object-level mapping and learning-based motion planning to generate a motion that safely extracts occluded target objects from a pile. Planning is done by learning a deep Q-network that receives observations of predicted poses and a depth-based heightmap to output a motion trajectory, trained to maximize a safety metric reward. Our results show that the observation fusion of poses and depth-sensing gives both better performance and robustness to the model. We evaluate our methods using the YCB objects in both simulation and the real world, achieving safe object extraction from piles.
summary: Robots need object-level scene understanding to manipulate objects while reasoning about contact, support, and occlusion among objects. Given a pile of objects, object recognition and reconstruction can identify the boundary of object instances, giving important cues as to how the objects form and support the pile. In this work, we present a system, SafePicking, that integrates object-level mapping and learning-based motion planning to generate a motion that safely extracts occluded target objects from a pile. Planning is done by learning a deep Q-network that receives observations of predicted poses and a depth-based heightmap to output a motion trajectory, trained to maximize a safety metric reward. Our results show that the observation fusion of poses and depth-sensing gives both better performance and robustness to the model. We evaluate our methods using the YCB objects in both simulation and the real world, achieving safe object extraction from piles.
abstract_zh: 机器人需要对象级场景理解来操纵对象，同时推理对象之间的接触、支撑和遮挡。给定一堆对象，对象识别和重建可以识别对象实例的边界，从而提供有关对象如何形成和支撑这堆对象的重要线索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个名为 SafePicking 的系统，该系统集成了对象级映射和基于学习的运动规划，以生成能够安全地从一堆中提取被遮挡的目标对象的运动。规划是通过学习深度 Q 网络来完成的，该网络接收预测姿势的观察结果和基于深度的高度图以输出运动轨迹，经过训练以最大化安全指标奖励。我们的结果表明，姿势和深度感知的观察融合为模型提供了更好的性能和鲁棒性。我们在模拟和现实世界中使用 YCB 对象评估我们的方法，实现从桩中安全提取对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SafePicking系统，通过物体级映射与学习型运动规划结合，实现从物体堆中安全提取目标物体。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理物体堆中遮挡、支撑关系等复杂场景，需提升机器人抓取的安全性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 融合物体姿态预测与深度传感高度图，训练深度Q网络优化安全指标奖励，生成安全运动轨迹。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实环境中使用YCB物体测试，验证了姿态与深度信息融合的有效性，提升性能与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 物体级映射与学习规划结合可有效实现安全抓取，为复杂堆叠场景提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Arpit Bansal,Avi Schwarzschild,Eitan Borgnia,Zeyad Emam,Furong Huang,Micah Goldblum,Tom Goldstein
title: End-to-end Algorithm Synthesis with Recurrent Networks: Logical Extrapolation Without Overthinking
title_zh: 循环网络的端到端算法综合：无需过度思考的逻辑外推
abstract: Machine learning systems perform well on pattern matching tasks, but their ability to perform algorithmic or logical reasoning is not well understood. One important reasoning capability is algorithmic extrapolation, in which models trained only on small/simple reasoning problems can synthesize complex strategies for large/complex problems at test time. Algorithmic extrapolation can be achieved through recurrent systems, which can be iterated many times to solve difficult reasoning problems. We observe that this approach fails to scale to highly complex problems because behavior degenerates when many iterations are applied -- an issue we refer to as "overthinking." We propose a recall architecture that keeps an explicit copy of the problem instance in memory so that it cannot be forgotten. We also employ a progressive training routine that prevents the model from learning behaviors that are specific to iteration number and instead pushes it to learn behaviors that can be repeated indefinitely. These innovations prevent the overthinking problem, and enable recurrent systems to solve extremely hard extrapolation tasks.
summary: Machine learning systems perform well on pattern matching tasks, but their ability to perform algorithmic or logical reasoning is not well understood. One important reasoning capability is algorithmic extrapolation, in which models trained only on small/simple reasoning problems can synthesize complex strategies for large/complex problems at test time. Algorithmic extrapolation can be achieved through recurrent systems, which can be iterated many times to solve difficult reasoning problems. We observe that this approach fails to scale to highly complex problems because behavior degenerates when many iterations are applied -- an issue we refer to as "overthinking." We propose a recall architecture that keeps an explicit copy of the problem instance in memory so that it cannot be forgotten. We also employ a progressive training routine that prevents the model from learning behaviors that are specific to iteration number and instead pushes it to learn behaviors that can be repeated indefinitely. These innovations prevent the overthinking problem, and enable recurrent systems to solve extremely hard extrapolation tasks.
abstract_zh: 机器学习系统在模式匹配任务上表现良好，但其执行算法或逻辑推理的能力尚不清楚。一种重要的推理能力是算法外推，其中仅针对小/简单推理问题训练的模型可以在测试时合成针对大/复杂问题的复杂策略。算法外推可以通过循环系统来实现，循环系统可以迭代多次来解决困难的推理问题。我们观察到这种方法无法扩展到高度复杂的问题，因为当应用多次迭代时行为会退化——我们将这个问题称为“过度思考”。我们提出了一种召回架构，将问题实例的显式副本保留在内存中，以便它不会被遗忘。我们还采用渐进式训练例程，防止模型学习特定于迭代次数的行为，而是促使模型学习可以无限重复的行为。这些创新防止了过度思考的问题，并使循环系统能够解决极其困难的外推任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的循环网络架构和训练方法，解决算法外推中的过度思考问题，提升复杂任务的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有循环系统在处理复杂算法问题时易因多轮迭代导致行为退化（过度思考），限制了其在逻辑外推任务中的表现。
AI.method: 设计包含显式问题记忆模块的召回架构，并采用渐进式训练策略，使模型学习可无限重复的通用行为模式。
AI.result: 新方法有效抑制过度思考现象，使循环网络能够成功解决极端复杂的算法外推任务。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式记忆保持和渐进训练，循环网络可在不依赖特定迭代次数的情况下实现稳定高效的算法合成。

search_text: End-to-end Algorithm Synthesis with Recurrent Networks: Logical Extrapolation Without Overthinking 循环网络的端到端算法综合：无需过度思考的逻辑外推 Machine learning systems perform well on pattern matching tasks, but their ability to perform algorithmic or logical reasoning is not well understood. One important reasoning capability is algorithmic extrapolation, in which models trained only on small/simple reasoning problems can synthesize complex strategies for large/complex problems at test time. Algorithmic extrapolation can be achieved through recurrent systems, which can be iterated many times to solve difficult reasoning problems. We observe that this approach fails to scale to highly complex problems because behavior degenerates when many iterations are applied -- an issue we refer to as "overthinking." We propose a recall architecture that keeps an explicit copy of the problem instance in memory so that it cannot be forgotten. We also employ a progressive training routine that prevents the model from learning behaviors that are specific to iteration number and instead pushes it to learn behaviors that can be repeated indefinitely. These innovations prevent the overthinking problem, and enable recurrent systems to solve extremely hard extrapolation tasks. 机器学习系统在模式匹配任务上表现良好，但其执行算法或逻辑推理的能力尚不清楚。一种重要的推理能力是算法外推，其中仅针对小/简单推理问题训练的模型可以在测试时合成针对大/复杂问题的复杂策略。算法外推可以通过循环系统来实现，循环系统可以迭代多次来解决困难的推理问题。我们观察到这种方法无法扩展到高度复杂的问题，因为当应用多次迭代时行为会退化——我们将这个问题称为“过度思考”。我们提出了一种召回架构，将问题实例的显式副本保留在内存中，以便它不会被遗忘。我们还采用渐进式训练例程，防止模型学习特定于迭代次数的行为，而是促使模型学习可以无限重复的行为。这些创新防止了过度思考的问题，并使循环系统能够解决极其困难的外推任务。 本文提出一种改进的循环网络架构和训练方法，解决算法外推中的过度思考问题，提升复杂任务的推理能力。 Arpit Bansal,Avi Schwarzschild,Eitan Borgnia,Zeyad Emam,Furong Huang,Micah Goldblum,Tom Goldstein cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yael Vinker,Ehsan Pajouheshgar,Jessica Y. Bo,Roman Christian Bachmann,Amit Haim Bermano,Daniel Cohen-Or,Amir Zamir,Ariel Shamir
title: CLIPasso: Semantically-Aware Object Sketching
title_zh: CLIPasso：语义感知对象草图
abstract: Abstraction is at the heart of sketching due to the simple and minimal nature of line drawings. Abstraction entails identifying the essential visual properties of an object or scene, which requires semantic understanding and prior knowledge of high-level concepts. Abstract depictions are therefore challenging for artists, and even more so for machines. We present CLIPasso, an object sketching method that can achieve different levels of abstraction, guided by geometric and semantic simplifications. While sketch generation methods often rely on explicit sketch datasets for training, we utilize the remarkable ability of CLIP (Contrastive-Language-Image-Pretraining) to distill semantic concepts from sketches and images alike. We define a sketch as a set of Bézier curves and use a differentiable rasterizer to optimize the parameters of the curves directly with respect to a CLIP-based perceptual loss. The abstraction degree is controlled by varying the number of strokes. The generated sketches demonstrate multiple levels of abstraction while maintaining recognizability, underlying structure, and essential visual components of the subject drawn.
summary: Abstraction is at the heart of sketching due to the simple and minimal nature of line drawings. Abstraction entails identifying the essential visual properties of an object or scene, which requires semantic understanding and prior knowledge of high-level concepts. Abstract depictions are therefore challenging for artists, and even more so for machines. We present CLIPasso, an object sketching method that can achieve different levels of abstraction, guided by geometric and semantic simplifications. While sketch generation methods often rely on explicit sketch datasets for training, we utilize the remarkable ability of CLIP (Contrastive-Language-Image-Pretraining) to distill semantic concepts from sketches and images alike. We define a sketch as a set of Bézier curves and use a differentiable rasterizer to optimize the parameters of the curves directly with respect to a CLIP-based perceptual loss. The abstraction degree is controlled by varying the number of strokes. The generated sketches demonstrate multiple levels of abstraction while maintaining recognizability, underlying structure, and essential visual components of the subject drawn.
abstract_zh: 由于线条图的简单性和简约性，抽象是素描的核心。抽象需要识别对象或场景的基本视觉属性，这需要语义理解和高级概念的先验知识。因此，抽象描绘对于艺术家来说是一个挑战，对于机器来说更是如此。我们提出了 CLIPasso，一种对象草图方法，可以在几何和语义简化的指导下实现不同级别的抽象。虽然草图生成方法通常依赖于显式草图数据集进行训练，但我们利用 CLIP（对比语言图像预训练）的卓越能力从草图和图像中提取语义概念。我们将草图定义为一组贝塞尔曲线，并使用可微分光栅器直接针对基于 CLIP 的感知损失来优化曲线参数。抽象程度是通过改变笔画数量来控制的。生成的草图展示了多个抽象层次，同时保持了所绘制主题的可识别性、底层结构和基本视觉组件。

AI.tldr: 提出CLIPasso方法，通过几何和语义简化生成不同抽象层次的物体素描
AI.motivation: 传统素描生成依赖显式数据集，难以捕捉语义抽象；CLIPasso利用CLIP模型从图像和素描中提取语义，实现更自然的抽象生成
AI.method: 基于贝塞尔曲线和可微光栅化器，结合CLIP的感知损失优化曲线参数，通过调整笔画数量控制抽象级别
AI.result: 生成的素描在不同抽象层次下保持可识别性和结构，有效保留关键视觉元素
AI.conclusion: CLIPasso通过结合CLIP的语义理解和几何优化，实现了可控的语义感知素描生成，优于依赖数据集的传统方法

authors_text: Arnaud Huaulmé,Kanako Harada,Quang-Minh Nguyen,Bogyu Park,Seungbum Hong,Min-Kook Choi,Michael Peven,Yunshuang Li,Yonghao Long,Qi Dou,Satyadwyoom Kumar,Seenivasan Lalithkumar,Ren Hongliang,Hiroki Matsuzaki,Yuto Ishikawa,Yuriko Harai,Satoshi Kondo,Mamoru Mitsuishi,Pierre Jannin
title: PEg TRAnsfer Workflow recognition challenge report: Does multi-modal data improve recognition?
title_zh: PEg TRansfer 工作流识别挑战报告：多模态数据能否提高识别能力？
abstract: This paper presents the design and results of the "PEg TRAnsfert Workflow recognition" (PETRAW) challenge whose objective was to develop surgical workflow recognition methods based on one or several modalities, among video, kinematic, and segmentation data, in order to study their added value. The PETRAW challenge provided a data set of 150 peg transfer sequences performed on a virtual simulator. This data set was composed of videos, kinematics, semantic segmentation, and workflow annotations which described the sequences at three different granularity levels: phase, step, and activity. Five tasks were proposed to the participants: three of them were related to the recognition of all granularities with one of the available modalities, while the others addressed the recognition with a combination of modalities. Average application-dependent balanced accuracy (AD-Accuracy) was used as evaluation metric to take unbalanced classes into account and because it is more clinically relevant than a frame-by-frame score. Seven teams participated in at least one task and four of them in all tasks. Best results are obtained with the use of the video and the kinematics data with an AD-Accuracy between 93% and 90% for the four teams who participated in all tasks. The improvement between video/kinematic-based methods and the uni-modality ones was significant for all of the teams. However, the difference in testing execution time between the video/kinematic-based and the kinematic-based methods has to be taken into consideration. Is it relevant to spend 20 to 200 times more computing time for less than 3% of improvement? The PETRAW data set is publicly available at www.synapse.org/PETRAW to encourage further research in surgical workflow recognition.
summary: This paper presents the design and results of the "PEg TRAnsfert Workflow recognition" (PETRAW) challenge whose objective was to develop surgical workflow recognition methods based on one or several modalities, among video, kinematic, and segmentation data, in order to study their added value. The PETRAW challenge provided a data set of 150 peg transfer sequences performed on a virtual simulator. This data set was composed of videos, kinematics, semantic segmentation, and workflow annotations which described the sequences at three different granularity levels: phase, step, and activity. Five tasks were proposed to the participants: three of them were related to the recognition of all granularities with one of the available modalities, while the others addressed the recognition with a combination of modalities. Average application-dependent balanced accuracy (AD-Accuracy) was used as evaluation metric to take unbalanced classes into account and because it is more clinically relevant than a frame-by-frame score. Seven teams participated in at least one task and four of them in all tasks. Best results are obtained with the use of the video and the kinematics data with an AD-Accuracy between 93% and 90% for the four teams who participated in all tasks. The improvement between video/kinematic-based methods and the uni-modality ones was significant for all of the teams. However, the difference in testing execution time between the video/kinematic-based and the kinematic-based methods has to be taken into consideration. Is it relevant to spend 20 to 200 times more computing time for less than 3% of improvement? The PETRAW data set is publicly available at www.synapse.org/PETRAW to encourage further research in surgical workflow recognition.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了“PEg TRansfert 工作流程识别”(PETRAW) 挑战赛的设计和结果，其目标是开发基于视频、运动学和分割数据中的一种或多种模式的手术工作流程识别方法，以研究其附加价值。 PETRAW 挑战提供了在虚拟模拟器上执行的 150 个钉转移序列的数据集。该数据集由视频、运动学、语义分割和工作流注释组成，它们以三种不同的粒度级别描述序列：阶段、步骤和活动。向参与者提出了五项任务：其中三项与使用一种可用模式识别所有粒度有关，而其他任务则涉及使用多种模式的组合进行识别。平均应用相关的平衡准确度（AD-Accuracy）被用作评估指标，以考虑不平衡的类别，因为它比逐帧得分更具临床相关性。七个团队至少参与了一项任务，其中四个团队参与了所有任务。使用视频和运动学数据获得了最佳结果，参与所有任务的四个团队的 AD 准确度在 93% 到 90% 之间。基于视频/运动学的方法和单模态方法之间的改进对于所有团队来说都是意义重大的。然而，必须考虑基于视频/运动学的方法和基于运动学的方法之间测试执行时间的差异。为了不到 3% 的改进而花费 20 到 200 倍的计算时间是否有意义？ PETRAW 数据集可在 www.synapse.org/PETRAW 上公开获取，以鼓励手术流程识别方面的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了PETRAW挑战赛的设计与结果，旨在研究多模态数据（视频、运动学、分割数据）在手术工作流识别中的应用价值。
AI.motivation: 通过对比单模态与多模态数据的识别效果，探索不同模态数据对提升手术流程识别准确率的贡献，并评估其临床实用性。
AI.method: 构建包含150个虚拟手术序列的数据集，提供视频、运动学、分割数据及多粒度标注；设计五项任务（单模态与多模态识别），采用AD-Accuracy作为评估指标。
AI.result: 多模态方法（视频+运动学）在四支参赛队伍中达到90%-93%的AD-Accuracy，显著优于单模态方法，但计算耗时增加20-200倍。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据能有效提升识别准确率，但需权衡计算成本；数据集已公开以促进手术流程识别研究。

result: 多模态方法（视频+运动学）在四支参赛队伍中达到90%-93%的AD-Accuracy，显著优于单模态方法，但计算耗时增加20-200倍。
conclusion: 多模态数据能有效提升识别准确率，但需权衡计算成本；数据集已公开以促进手术流程识别研究。
search_text: PEg TRAnsfer Workflow recognition challenge report: Does multi-modal data improve recognition? PEg TRansfer 工作流识别挑战报告：多模态数据能否提高识别能力？ This paper presents the design and results of the "PEg TRAnsfert Workflow recognition" (PETRAW) challenge whose objective was to develop surgical workflow recognition methods based on one or several modalities, among video, kinematic, and segmentation data, in order to study their added value. The PETRAW challenge provided a data set of 150 peg transfer sequences performed on a virtual simulator. This data set was composed of videos, kinematics, semantic segmentation, and workflow annotations which described the sequences at three different granularity levels: phase, step, and activity. Five tasks were proposed to the participants: three of them were related to the recognition of all granularities with one of the available modalities, while the others addressed the recognition with a combination of modalities. Average application-dependent balanced accuracy (AD-Accuracy) was used as evaluation metric to take unbalanced classes into account and because it is more clinically relevant than a frame-by-frame score. Seven teams participated in at least one task and four of them in all tasks. Best results are obtained with the use of the video and the kinematics data with an AD-Accuracy between 93% and 90% for the four teams who participated in all tasks. The improvement between video/kinematic-based methods and the uni-modality ones was significant for all of the teams. However, the difference in testing execution time between the video/kinematic-based and the kinematic-based methods has to be taken into consideration. Is it relevant to spend 20 to 200 times more computing time for less than 3% of improvement? The PETRAW data set is publicly available at www.synapse.org/PETRAW to encourage further research in surgical workflow recognition. 本文介绍了“PEg TRansfert 工作流程识别”(PETRAW) 挑战赛的设计和结果，其目标是开发基于视频、运动学和分割数据中的一种或多种模式的手术工作流程识别方法，以研究其附加价值。 PETRAW 挑战提供了在虚拟模拟器上执行的 150 个钉转移序列的数据集。该数据集由视频、运动学、语义分割和工作流注释组成，它们以三种不同的粒度级别描述序列：阶段、步骤和活动。向参与者提出了五项任务：其中三项与使用一种可用模式识别所有粒度有关，而其他任务则涉及使用多种模式的组合进行识别。平均应用相关的平衡准确度（AD-Accuracy）被用作评估指标，以考虑不平衡的类别，因为它比逐帧得分更具临床相关性。七个团队至少参与了一项任务，其中四个团队参与了所有任务。使用视频和运动学数据获得了最佳结果，参与所有任务的四个团队的 AD 准确度在 93% 到 90% 之间。基于视频/运动学的方法和单模态方法之间的改进对于所有团队来说都是意义重大的。然而，必须考虑基于视频/运动学的方法和基于运动学的方法之间测试执行时间的差异。为了不到 3% 的改进而花费 20 到 200 倍的计算时间是否有意义？ PETRAW 数据集可在 www.synapse.org/PETRAW 上公开获取，以鼓励手术流程识别方面的进一步研究。 本文介绍了PETRAW挑战赛的设计与结果，旨在研究多模态数据（视频、运动学、分割数据）在手术工作流识别中的应用价值。 Arnaud Huaulmé,Kanako Harada,Quang-Minh Nguyen,Bogyu Park,Seungbum Hong,Min-Kook Choi,Michael Peven,Yunshuang Li,Yonghao Long,Qi Dou,Satyadwyoom Kumar,Seenivasan Lalithkumar,Ren Hongliang,Hiroki Matsuzaki,Yuto Ishikawa,Yuriko Harai,Satoshi Kondo,Mamoru Mitsuishi,Pierre Jannin cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DB

title: Nonprehensile Manipulation of a Stick Using Impulsive Forces
title_zh: 使用脉冲力对棍子进行不可抓握的操纵
comment: This work has been submitted for possible publication. This version submitted to Nonlinear Dynamics on 28 Jun 2022
comments: This work has been submitted for possible publication. This version submitted to Nonlinear Dynamics on 28 Jun 2022
abstract: The problem of nonprehensile manipulation of a stick in three-dimensional space using intermittent impulsive forces is considered. The objective is to juggle the stick between a sequence of configurations that are rotationally symmetric about the vertical axis. The dynamics of the stick is described by five generalized coordinates and three control inputs. Between two consecutive configurations where impulsive inputs are applied, the dynamics is conveniently represented by a Poincaré map in the reference frame of the juggler. Stabilization of the orbit associated with a desired juggling motion is accomplished by stabilizing a fixed point on the Poincaré map. The Impulse Controlled Poincaré Map approach is used to stabilize the orbit, and numerical simulations are used to demonstrate convergence to the desired juggling motion from an arbitrary initial configuration. In the limiting case, where consecutive rotationally symmetric configurations are chosen arbitrarily close, it is shown that the dynamics reduces to that of steady precession of the stick on a hoop.
summary: The problem of nonprehensile manipulation of a stick in three-dimensional space using intermittent impulsive forces is considered. The objective is to juggle the stick between a sequence of configurations that are rotationally symmetric about the vertical axis. Between two consecutive configurations where impulsive inputs are applied, the dynamics is conveniently represented by a Poincaré map in the reference frame of the juggler. Stabilization of the orbit associated with a desired juggling motion is accomplished by stabilizing a fixed point on the Poincaré map. The Impulse Controlled Poincaré Map approach is used to stabilize the orbit, and numerical simulations are used to demonstrate convergence to the desired juggling motion from an arbitrary initial configuration. In the limiting case, where consecutive rotationally symmetric configurations are chosen arbitrarily close, it is shown that the dynamics reduces to that of steady precession of the stick on a hoop.
abstract_zh: 考虑使用间歇性脉冲力在三维空间中不可理解地操纵棍子的问题。目标是在一系列关于垂直轴旋转对称的配置之间调整操纵杆。操纵杆的动力学由五个广义坐标和三个控制输入来描述。在施加脉冲输入的两个连续配置之间，动态可以通过杂耍者参考系中的庞加莱图方便地表示。与所需的杂耍运动相关的轨道的稳定是通过稳定庞加莱图上的固定点来实现的。脉冲控制庞加莱图方法用于稳定轨道，数值模拟用于证明从任意初始配置收敛到所需的杂耍运动。在极限情况下，连续旋转对称配置被选择为任意接近，结果表明，动力学降低到棒在环上的稳定进动的动力学。

AI.tldr: 研究在三维空间中使用冲击力实现棍棒的非抓取式操控，使其在垂直轴旋转对称的配置间保持动态平衡。
AI.motivation: 旨在克服传统抓取式操控的限制，探索通过间歇性冲击力实现动态平衡的新方法，为复杂机械系统的控制提供理论依据。
AI.method: 采用冲击控制的Poincaré映射方法，通过稳定映射的不动点实现轨道稳定，并利用数值模拟验证收敛性。
AI.result: 数值模拟验证了从任意初始配置收敛到期望的juggling运动，且在极限情况下动力学等效于棍棒在环上的稳定进动。
AI.conclusion: 证明了冲击控制Poincaré映射方法的有效性，为非抓取式动态操控提供了可行的解决方案，并揭示了其在极限情况下的动力学特性。

title: The HaMSE Ontology: Using Semantic Technologies to support Music Representation Interoperability and Musicological Analysis
title_zh: HaMSE 本体：使用语义技术支持音乐表示互操作性和音乐学分析
abstract: The use of Semantic Technologies - in particular the Semantic Web - has revealed to be a great tool for describing the cultural heritage domain and artistic practices. However, the panorama of ontologies for musicological applications seems to be limited and restricted to specific applications. In this research, we propose HaMSE, an ontology capable of describing musical features that can assist musicological research. More specifically, HaMSE proposes to address sues that have been affecting musicological research for decades: the representation of music and the relationship between quantitative and qualitative data. To do this, HaMSE allows the alignment between different music representation systems and describes a set of musicological features that can allow the music analysis at different granularity levels.
summary: The use of Semantic Technologies - in particular the Semantic Web - has revealed to be a great tool for describing the cultural heritage domain and artistic practices. However, the panorama of ontologies for musicological applications seems to be limited and restricted to specific applications. In this research, we propose HaMSE, an ontology capable of describing musical features that can assist musicological research. More specifically, HaMSE proposes to address sues that have been affecting musicological research for decades: the representation of music and the relationship between quantitative and qualitative data. To do this, HaMSE allows the alignment between different music representation systems and describes a set of musicological features that can allow the music analysis at different granularity levels.
abstract_zh: 语义技术（尤其是语义网）的使用已被证明是描述文化遗产领域和艺术实践的绝佳工具。然而，音乐学应用的本体论的全景似乎是有限的并且仅限于特定的应用。在这项研究中，我们提出了 HaMSE，一种能够描述音乐特征的本体论，可以帮助音乐学研究。更具体地说，HaMSE 提议解决几十年来影响音乐学研究的问题：音乐的表征以及定量和定性数据之间的关系。为此，HaMSE 允许不同音乐表示系统之间的对齐，并描述一组音乐学特征，这些特征可以允许在不同粒度级别进行音乐分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HaMSE本体，利用语义技术解决音乐表示互操作性和音乐学术分析中的长期问题。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐学术应用的本体局限于特定场景，难以处理音乐表示与定量/定性数据的关系，阻碍了跨领域研究。
AI.method: 构建HaMSE本体，通过不同音乐表示系统的对齐机制，并定义多粒度音乐学术特征描述框架。
AI.result: 实现了音乐数据的跨表示系统互操作，支持从微观到宏观的多维度音乐分析与特征关联。
AI.conclusion: HaMSE为音乐学术研究提供了统一的语义基础，有效促进了定量分析与定性研究的融合。

title: Overhead Image Factors for Underwater Sonar-based SLAM
title_zh: 基于水下声纳的 SLAM 的俯视图像因素
comment: To appear in RA-L 2022 and presented at ICRA 2022
comments: To appear in RA-L 2022 and presented at ICRA 2022
abstract: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a critical capability for any autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV). However, robust, accurate state estimation is still a work in progress when using low-cost sensors. We propose enhancing a typical low-cost sensor package using widely available and often free prior information; overhead imagery. Given an AUV's sonar image and a partially overlapping, globally-referenced overhead image, we propose using a convolutional neural network (CNN) to generate a synthetic overhead image predicting the above-surface appearance of the sonar image contents. We then use this synthetic overhead image to register our observations to the provided global overhead image. Once registered, the transformation is introduced as a factor into a pose SLAM factor graph. We use a state-of-the-art simulation environment to perform validation over a series of benchmark trajectories and quantitatively show the improved accuracy of robot state estimation using the proposed approach. We also show qualitative outcomes from a real AUV field deployment. Video attachment: https://youtu.be/_uWljtp58ks
summary: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a critical capability for any autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV). However, robust, accurate state estimation is still a work in progress when using low-cost sensors. We propose enhancing a typical low-cost sensor package using widely available and often free prior information; overhead imagery. Given an AUV's sonar image and a partially overlapping, globally-referenced overhead image, we propose using a convolutional neural network (CNN) to generate a synthetic overhead image predicting the above-surface appearance of the sonar image contents. We then use this synthetic overhead image to register our observations to the provided global overhead image. Once registered, the transformation is introduced as a factor into a pose SLAM factor graph. We use a state-of-the-art simulation environment to perform validation over a series of benchmark trajectories and quantitatively show the improved accuracy of robot state estimation using the proposed approach. We also show qualitative outcomes from a real AUV field deployment. Video attachment: https://youtu.be/_uWljtp58ks
abstract_zh: 同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 是任何自主水下航行器 (AUV) 的一项关键功能。然而，在使用低成本传感器时，稳健、准确的状态估计仍然是一项正在进行的工作。我们建议使用广泛可用且通常免费的先验信息来增强典型的低成本传感器包；头顶图像。给定 AUV 的声纳图像和部分重叠的全局参考俯视图像，我们建议使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 生成合成俯视图像，预测声纳图像内容的表面以上外观。然后，我们使用该合成俯视图像将我们的观察结果注册到提供的全局俯视图像。一旦注册，变换就会作为一个因子引入到姿态 SLAM 因子图中。我们使用最先进的仿真环境对一系列基准轨迹进行验证，并定量显示使用所提出的方法提高机器人状态估计的准确性。我们还展示了真实 AUV 现场部署的定性结果。视频附件：https://youtu.be/_uWljtp58ks

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用俯视图像信息增强水下声呐SLAM系统的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 低成本水下传感器的SLAM系统存在状态估计不准确的问题，需借助外部先验信息提升性能。
AI.method: 通过卷积神经网络生成声呐图像对应的合成俯视图，将其与全局俯视图像配准后作为因子图优化的约束条件。
AI.result: 仿真测试显示定位精度提升，实际水下无人航行器部署验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合俯视图像信息可显著提升低成本水下SLAM系统的鲁棒性与准确性。

search_text: Overhead Image Factors for Underwater Sonar-based SLAM 基于水下声纳的 SLAM 的俯视图像因素 Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a critical capability for any autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV). However, robust, accurate state estimation is still a work in progress when using low-cost sensors. We propose enhancing a typical low-cost sensor package using widely available and often free prior information; overhead imagery. Given an AUV's sonar image and a partially overlapping, globally-referenced overhead image, we propose using a convolutional neural network (CNN) to generate a synthetic overhead image predicting the above-surface appearance of the sonar image contents. We then use this synthetic overhead image to register our observations to the provided global overhead image. Once registered, the transformation is introduced as a factor into a pose SLAM factor graph. We use a state-of-the-art simulation environment to perform validation over a series of benchmark trajectories and quantitatively show the improved accuracy of robot state estimation using the proposed approach. We also show qualitative outcomes from a real AUV field deployment. Video attachment: https://youtu.be/_uWljtp58ks 同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 是任何自主水下航行器 (AUV) 的一项关键功能。然而，在使用低成本传感器时，稳健、准确的状态估计仍然是一项正在进行的工作。我们建议使用广泛可用且通常免费的先验信息来增强典型的低成本传感器包；头顶图像。给定 AUV 的声纳图像和部分重叠的全局参考俯视图像，我们建议使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 生成合成俯视图像，预测声纳图像内容的表面以上外观。然后，我们使用该合成俯视图像将我们的观察结果注册到提供的全局俯视图像。一旦注册，变换就会作为一个因子引入到姿态 SLAM 因子图中。我们使用最先进的仿真环境对一系列基准轨迹进行验证，并定量显示使用所提出的方法提高机器人状态估计的准确性。我们还展示了真实 AUV 现场部署的定性结果。视频附件：https://youtu.be/_uWljtp58ks 本文提出利用俯视图像信息增强水下声呐SLAM系统的定位精度。 John McConnell,Fanfei Chen,Brendan Englot cs.RO

authors_text: Arna Ghosh,Arnab Kumar Mondal,Kumar Krishna Agrawal,Blake Richards
title: Investigating Power laws in Deep Representation Learning
title_zh: 研究深度表示学习中的幂律
abstract: Representation learning that leverages large-scale labelled datasets, is central to recent progress in machine learning. Access to task relevant labels at scale is often scarce or expensive, motivating the need to learn from unlabelled datasets with self-supervised learning (SSL). Such large unlabelled datasets (with data augmentations) often provide a good coverage of the underlying input distribution. However evaluating the representations learned by SSL algorithms still requires task-specific labelled samples in the training pipeline. Additionally, the generalization of task-specific encoding is often sensitive to potential distribution shift. Inspired by recent advances in theoretical machine learning and vision neuroscience, we observe that the eigenspectrum of the empirical feature covariance matrix often follows a power law. For visual representations, we estimate the coefficient of the power law, $α$, across three key attributes which influence representation learning: learning objective (supervised, SimCLR, Barlow Twins and BYOL), network architecture (VGG, ResNet and Vision Transformer), and tasks (object and scene recognition). We observe that under mild conditions, proximity of $α$ to 1, is strongly correlated to the downstream generalization performance. Furthermore, $α\approx 1$ is a strong indicator of robustness to label noise during fine-tuning. Notably, $α$ is computable from the representations without knowledge of any labels, thereby offering a framework to evaluate the quality of representations in unlabelled datasets.
summary: Representation learning that leverages large-scale labelled datasets, is central to recent progress in machine learning. Access to task relevant labels at scale is often scarce or expensive, motivating the need to learn from unlabelled datasets with self-supervised learning (SSL). Such large unlabelled datasets (with data augmentations) often provide a good coverage of the underlying input distribution. However evaluating the representations learned by SSL algorithms still requires task-specific labelled samples in the training pipeline. Additionally, the generalization of task-specific encoding is often sensitive to potential distribution shift. Inspired by recent advances in theoretical machine learning and vision neuroscience, we observe that the eigenspectrum of the empirical feature covariance matrix often follows a power law. For visual representations, we estimate the coefficient of the power law, $α$, across three key attributes which influence representation learning: learning objective (supervised, SimCLR, Barlow Twins and BYOL), network architecture (VGG, ResNet and Vision Transformer), and tasks (object and scene recognition). We observe that under mild conditions, proximity of $α$ to 1, is strongly correlated to the downstream generalization performance. Furthermore, $α\approx 1$ is a strong indicator of robustness to label noise during fine-tuning. Notably, $α$ is computable from the representations without knowledge of any labels, thereby offering a framework to evaluate the quality of representations in unlabelled datasets.
abstract_zh: 利用大规模标记数据集的表示学习是机器学习最新进展的核心。大规模访问任务相关标签通常是稀缺或昂贵的，这激发了通过自我监督学习（SSL）从未标记数据集进行学习的需求。如此大的未标记数据集（带有数据增强）通常可以很好地覆盖底层输入分布。然而，评估 SSL 算法学习到的表示仍然需要训练管道中特定于任务的标记样本。此外，特定于任务的编码的泛化通常对潜在的分布变化敏感。受理论机器学习和视觉神经科学最新进展的启发，我们观察到经验特征协方差矩阵的特征谱通常遵循幂律。对于视觉表示，我们估计影响表示学习的三个关键属性的幂律系数 $α$：学习目标（监督、SimCLR、Barlow Twins 和 BYOL）、网络架构（VGG、ResNet 和 Vision Transformer）以及任务（对象和场景识别）。我们观察到，在温和的条件下，$α$ 接近 1，与下游泛化性能密切相关。此外，$α\approx 1$ 是微调期间标记噪声的鲁棒性的有力指标。值得注意的是，$α$ 可以在不知道任何标签的情况下根据表示计算出来，从而提供了一个评估未标​​记数据集中表示质量的框架。

AI.tldr: 研究深度表征学习中幂律现象与模型性能的关系，提出基于幂律系数α的无监督表征质量评估框架。
AI.motivation: 大规模标记数据稀缺且昂贵，自监督学习依赖未标记数据但缺乏有效评估方法，且模型泛化能力易受分布偏移影响。
AI.method: 通过分析不同学习目标（监督/SSL）、网络架构（VGG/ResNet/ViT）和任务（物体/场景识别）下的特征协方差矩阵幂律系数α，研究其与下游任务性能的关联性。
AI.result: α接近1时模型泛化性能更优且鲁棒性更强，且α可独立于标签计算，为无监督表征评估提供新指标。
AI.conclusion: 幂律系数α可作为衡量表征质量的通用指标，为无标签数据集的模型评估提供理论依据和实践框架。

title: Parametrized motion planning and topological complexity
title_zh: 参数化运动规划和拓扑复杂性
abstract: In this paper we study paramertized motion planning algorithms which provide universal and flexible solutions to diverse motion planning problems. Such algorithms are intended to function under a variety of external conditions which are viewed as parameters and serve as part of the input of the algorithm. Continuing a recent paper, we study further the concept of parametrized topological complexity. We analyse in full detail the problem of controlling a swarm of robots in the presence of multiple obstacles in Euclidean space which served for us a natural motivating example. We present an explicit parametrized motion planning algorithm solving the motion planning problem for any number of robots and obstacles.. This algorithm is optimal, it has minimal possible topological complexity for any d odd. Besides, we describe a modification of this algorithm which is optimal for d even. We also analyse the parametrized topological complexity of sphere bundles using the Stiefel - Whitney characteristic classes.
summary: In this paper we study paramertized motion planning algorithms which provide universal and flexible solutions to diverse motion planning problems. Such algorithms are intended to function under a variety of external conditions which are viewed as parameters and serve as part of the input of the algorithm. Continuing a recent paper, we study further the concept of parametrized topological complexity. We analyse in full detail the problem of controlling a swarm of robots in the presence of multiple obstacles in Euclidean space which served for us a natural motivating example. We present an explicit parametrized motion planning algorithm solving the motion planning problem for any number of robots and obstacles.. This algorithm is optimal, it has minimal possible topological complexity for any d odd. Besides, we describe a modification of this algorithm which is optimal for d even. We also analyse the parametrized topological complexity of sphere bundles using the Stiefel - Whitney characteristic classes.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究参数化运动规划算法，该算法为不同的运动规划问题提供通用且灵活的解决方案。此类算法旨在在各种外部条件下运行，这些外部条件被视为参数并作为算法输入的一部分。继续最近的一篇论文，我们进一步研究了参数化拓扑复杂性的概念。我们详细分析了在欧几里得空间中存在多个障碍物的情况下控制一群机器人的问题，这为我们提供了一个自然的激励示例。我们提出了一种显式参数化运动规划算法，可以解决任意数量的机器人和障碍物的运动规划问题。该算法是最优的，对于任何 d 个奇数，它具有最小可能的拓扑复杂度。此外，我们描述了该算法的一种修改，它对于 d Even 是最佳的。我们还使用 Stiefel - Whitney 特征类分析了球丛的参数化拓扑复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究参数化运动规划算法及其拓扑复杂度，提出适用于多机器人避障问题的通用解决方案。
AI.motivation: 为应对多样化的外部环境参数，开发具有普适性的运动规划算法，并通过机器人集群避障问题验证理论有效性。
AI.method: 通过分析参数化拓扑复杂度理论，结合机器人集群运动规划实例，设计显式算法并利用Stiefel-Whitney特征类分析球面束复杂度。
AI.result: 提出适用于任意机器人/障碍物数量的最优算法（d为奇数时），并给出d为偶数时的改进方案，同时建立球面束的参数化复杂度理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 实现了参数化运动规划理论与实际机器人控制的结合，深化了对拓扑复杂度在动态环境中的理解。

method: 通过分析参数化拓扑复杂度理论，结合机器人集群运动规划实例，设计显式算法并利用Stiefel-Whitney特征类分析球面束复杂度。
result: 提出适用于任意机器人/障碍物数量的最优算法（d为奇数时），并给出d为偶数时的改进方案，同时建立球面束的参数化复杂度理论框架。
conclusion: 实现了参数化运动规划理论与实际机器人控制的结合，深化了对拓扑复杂度在动态环境中的理解。
search_text: Parametrized motion planning and topological complexity 参数化运动规划和拓扑复杂性 In this paper we study paramertized motion planning algorithms which provide universal and flexible solutions to diverse motion planning problems. Such algorithms are intended to function under a variety of external conditions which are viewed as parameters and serve as part of the input of the algorithm. Continuing a recent paper, we study further the concept of parametrized topological complexity. We analyse in full detail the problem of controlling a swarm of robots in the presence of multiple obstacles in Euclidean space which served for us a natural motivating example. We present an explicit parametrized motion planning algorithm solving the motion planning problem for any number of robots and obstacles.. This algorithm is optimal, it has minimal possible topological complexity for any d odd. Besides, we describe a modification of this algorithm which is optimal for d even. We also analyse the parametrized topological complexity of sphere bundles using the Stiefel - Whitney characteristic classes. 在本文中，我们研究参数化运动规划算法，该算法为不同的运动规划问题提供通用且灵活的解决方案。此类算法旨在在各种外部条件下运行，这些外部条件被视为参数并作为算法输入的一部分。继续最近的一篇论文，我们进一步研究了参数化拓扑复杂性的概念。我们详细分析了在欧几里得空间中存在多个障碍物的情况下控制一群机器人的问题，这为我们提供了一个自然的激励示例。我们提出了一种显式参数化运动规划算法，可以解决任意数量的机器人和障碍物的运动规划问题。该算法是最优的，对于任何 d 个奇数，它具有最小可能的拓扑复杂度。此外，我们描述了该算法的一种修改，它对于 d Even 是最佳的。我们还使用 Stiefel - Whitney 特征类分析了球丛的参数化拓扑复杂性。 本文研究参数化运动规划算法及其拓扑复杂度，提出适用于多机器人避障问题的通用解决方案。 Michael Farber,Shmuel Weinberger cs.RO,math.AT

authors_text: Nicolò Dal Fabbro,Subhrakanti Dey,Michele Rossi,Luca Schenato
title: SHED: A Newton-type algorithm for federated learning based on incremental Hessian eigenvector sharing
title_zh: SHED：基于增量Hessian特征向量共享的牛顿型联邦学习算法
comment: The name of the algorithm has been changed to SHED (Sharing Hessian Eigenvectors for Distributed learning). Section 3 has been enriched with an example Figure. In Sec. 5, the main theorems have been updated and improved, explicit sufficient conditions for the beginning of the linear convergence phase have been provided and conditions for super linear convergence have been made more general
comments: The name of the algorithm has been changed to SHED (Sharing Hessian Eigenvectors for Distributed learning). Section 3 has been enriched with an example Figure. In Sec. 5, the main theorems have been updated and improved, explicit sufficient conditions for the beginning of the linear convergence phase have been provided and conditions for super linear convergence have been made more general
abstract: There is a growing interest in the distributed optimization framework that goes under the name of Federated Learning (FL). In particular, much attention is being turned to FL scenarios where the network is strongly heterogeneous in terms of communication resources (e.g., bandwidth) and data distribution. In these cases, communication between local machines (agents) and the central server (Master) is a main consideration. In this work, we present SHED, an original communication-constrained Newton-type (NT) algorithm designed to accelerate FL in such heterogeneous scenarios. SHED is by design robust to non i.i.d. data distributions, handles heterogeneity of agents' communication resources (CRs), only requires sporadic Hessian computations, and achieves super-linear convergence. This is possible thanks to an incremental strategy, based on eigendecomposition of the local Hessian matrices, which exploits (possibly) outdated second-order information. The proposed solution is thoroughly validated on real datasets by assessing (i) the number of communication rounds required for convergence, (ii) the overall amount of data transmitted and (iii) the number of local Hessian computations. For all these metrics, the proposed approach shows superior performance against state-of-the art techniques like GIANT and FedNL.
summary: There is a growing interest in the distributed optimization framework that goes under the name of Federated Learning (FL). In particular, much attention is being turned to FL scenarios where the network is strongly heterogeneous in terms of communication resources (e.g., bandwidth) and data distribution. In these cases, communication between local machines (agents) and the central server (Master) is a main consideration. In this work, we present SHED, an original communication-constrained Newton-type (NT) algorithm designed to accelerate FL in such heterogeneous scenarios. SHED is by design robust to non i.i.d. data distributions, handles heterogeneity of agents' communication resources (CRs), only requires sporadic Hessian computations, and achieves super-linear convergence. This is possible thanks to an incremental strategy, based on eigendecomposition of the local Hessian matrices, which exploits (possibly) outdated second-order information. The proposed solution is thoroughly validated on real datasets by assessing (i) the number of communication rounds required for convergence, (ii) the overall amount of data transmitted and (iii) the number of local Hessian computations. For all these metrics, the proposed approach shows superior performance against state-of-the art techniques like GIANT and FedNL.
abstract_zh: 人们对联邦学习 (FL) 名称下的分布式优化框架越来越感兴趣。特别是，人们越来越关注 FL 场景，其中网络在通信资源（例如带宽）和数据分布方面具有很强的异构性。在这些情况下，本地机器（代理）和中央服务器（主服务器）之间的通信是主要考虑因素。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SHED，这是一种原始的通信受限牛顿型 (NT) 算法，旨在在此类异构场景中加速 FL。 SHED 在设计上对非独立同分布具有鲁棒性。数据分布，处理代理通信资源（CR）的异构性，仅需要零星的Hessian计算，并实现超线性收敛。这得益于基于局部 Hessian 矩阵特征分解的增量策略，该策略利用了（可能）过时的二阶信息。通过评估 (i) 收敛所需的通信轮数、(ii) 传输的数据总量和 (iii) 本地 Hessian 计算的数量，所提出的解决方案在真实数据集上得到了彻底验证。对于所有这些指标，所提出的方法显示出与 GIANT 和 FedNL 等最先进技术相比的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SHED的牛顿型算法，旨在通过增量Hessian特征向量共享来加速异构联邦学习场景下的通信效率。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在面对通信资源异构和非独立同分布数据时，存在收敛速度慢、通信开销大等问题，需设计更高效的算法。
AI.method: SHED算法基于局部Hessian矩阵的特征分解，采用增量策略共享特征向量，仅需偶尔计算Hessian矩阵，从而减少通信开销并实现超线性收敛。
AI.result: 实验表明，SHED在通信轮次、传输数据量及局部Hessian计算次数等指标上均优于GIANT和FedNL等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SHED通过有效利用二阶信息和增量共享策略，在异构联邦学习环境中显著提升了通信效率与收敛性能。

In particular, much attention is being turned to FL scenarios where the network is strongly heterogeneous in terms of communication resources (e.g., bandwidth) and data distribution. In these cases, communication between local machines (agents) and the central server (Master) is a main consideration. The proposed solution is thoroughly validated on real datasets by assessing (i) the number of communication rounds required for convergence, (ii) the overall amount of data transmitted and (iii) the number of local Hessian computations. title: Meta-learning with GANs for anomaly detection, with deployment in high-speed rail inspection system
title_zh: 使用 GAN 进行元学习进行异常检测，并部署在高铁检查系统中
abstract: Anomaly detection has been an active research area with a wide range of potential applications. Key challenges for anomaly detection in the AI era with big data include lack of prior knowledge of potential anomaly types, highly complex and noisy background in input data, scarce abnormal samples, and imbalanced training dataset. In this work, we propose a meta-learning framework for anomaly detection to deal with these issues. Within this framework, we incorporate the idea of generative adversarial networks (GANs) with appropriate choices of loss functions including structural similarity index measure (SSIM). Experiments with limited labeled data for high-speed rail inspection demonstrate that our meta-learning framework is sharp and robust in identifying anomalies. Our framework has been deployed in five high-speed railways of China since 2021: it has reduced more than 99.7% workload and saved 96.7% inspection time.
summary: Anomaly detection has been an active research area with a wide range of potential applications. Key challenges for anomaly detection in the AI era with big data include lack of prior knowledge of potential anomaly types, highly complex and noisy background in input data, scarce abnormal samples, and imbalanced training dataset. In this work, we propose a meta-learning framework for anomaly detection to deal with these issues. Within this framework, we incorporate the idea of generative adversarial networks (GANs) with appropriate choices of loss functions including structural similarity index measure (SSIM). Experiments with limited labeled data for high-speed rail inspection demonstrate that our meta-learning framework is sharp and robust in identifying anomalies. Our framework has been deployed in five high-speed railways of China since 2021: it has reduced more than 99.7% workload and saved 96.7% inspection time.
abstract_zh: 异常检测一直是一个活跃的研究领域，具有广泛的潜在应用。大数据人工智能时代异常检测的主要挑战包括缺乏对潜在异常类型的先验知识、输入数据的高度复杂和嘈杂的背景、稀缺的异常样本以及不平衡的训练数据集。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于异常检测的元学习框架来处理这些问题。在此框架内，我们将生成对抗网络（GAN）的思想与损失函数的适当选择相结合，包括结构相似性指数测量（SSIM）。用有限的标记数据进行高铁检查的实验表明，我们的元学习框架在识别异常方面非常敏锐和稳健。自2021年以来，我们的框架已在中国5条高铁中部署：减少了99.7%以上的工作量，节省了96.7%的检查时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生成对抗网络（GAN）的元学习框架，用于解决高速铁路检测中的异常检测问题。
AI.motivation: 异常检测面临异常类型未知、数据复杂噪声大、异常样本稀缺及数据不平衡等挑战，需开发鲁棒且适用于有限标注数据的检测方法。
AI.method: 设计元学习框架，整合GAN生成对抗机制与结构相似性指数（SSIM）损失函数，以增强模型对复杂背景的适应能力与异常识别精度。
AI.result: 实验表明框架在有限标注数据下表现优异，部署于中国5条高速铁路后，工作量减少99.7%，检测时间节省96.7%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了异常检测核心难题，验证了元学习与GAN结合在工业场景中的可行性与高效性。

authors_text: Tran Cao Son,Enrico Pontelli,Marcello Balduccini,Torsten Schaub
title: Answer Set Planning: A Survey
title_zh: 答案集规划：调查
abstract: Answer Set Planning refers to the use of Answer Set Programming (ASP) to compute plans, i.e., solutions to planning problems, that transform a given state of the world to another state. The development of efficient and scalable answer set solvers has provided a significant boost to the development of ASP-based planning systems. This paper surveys the progress made during the last two and a half decades in the area of answer set planning, from its foundations to its use in challenging planning domains. The survey explores the advantages and disadvantages of answer set planning. It also discusses typical applications of answer set planning and presents a set of challenges for future research.
summary: Answer Set Planning refers to the use of Answer Set Programming (ASP) to compute plans, i.e., solutions to planning problems, that transform a given state of the world to another state. The development of efficient and scalable answer set solvers has provided a significant boost to the development of ASP-based planning systems. This paper surveys the progress made during the last two and a half decades in the area of answer set planning, from its foundations to its use in challenging planning domains. The survey explores the advantages and disadvantages of answer set planning. It also discusses typical applications of answer set planning and presents a set of challenges for future research.
abstract_zh: 答案集规划是指使用答案集编程（ASP）来计算计划，即规划问题的解决方案，将世界的一种给定状态转变为另一种状态。高效且可扩展的答案集求解器的开发极大地推动了基于 ASP 的规划系统的开发。本文调查了过去两个半世纪在答案集规划领域取得的进展，从其基础到其在具有挑战性的规划领域的使用。该调查探讨了答案集规划的优点和缺点。它还讨论了答案集规划的典型应用，并提出了未来研究的一系列挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了过去25年答案集规划领域的发展，涵盖其基础理论、应用案例及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着高效答案集求解器的出现，基于ASP的规划方法在复杂领域展现出潜力，需系统总结其进展与不足。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾分析ASP规划的理论基础、技术优势、典型应用场景及现存问题。
AI.result: 总结了ASP规划在处理复杂约束问题中的优势，指出其在可扩展性和计算效率上的局限性，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 答案集规划为复杂规划问题提供了有效工具，但需进一步优化求解效率以应对更大规模的实际应用。

search_text: Answer Set Planning: A Survey 答案集规划：调查 Answer Set Planning refers to the use of Answer Set Programming (ASP) to compute plans, i.e., solutions to planning problems, that transform a given state of the world to another state. The development of efficient and scalable answer set solvers has provided a significant boost to the development of ASP-based planning systems. This paper surveys the progress made during the last two and a half decades in the area of answer set planning, from its foundations to its use in challenging planning domains. The survey explores the advantages and disadvantages of answer set planning. It also discusses typical applications of answer set planning and presents a set of challenges for future research. 答案集规划是指使用答案集编程（ASP）来计算计划，即规划问题的解决方案，将世界的一种给定状态转变为另一种状态。高效且可扩展的答案集求解器的开发极大地推动了基于 ASP 的规划系统的开发。本文调查了过去两个半世纪在答案集规划领域取得的进展，从其基础到其在具有挑战性的规划领域的使用。该调查探讨了答案集规划的优点和缺点。它还讨论了答案集规划的典型应用，并提出了未来研究的一系列挑战。 本文综述了过去25年答案集规划领域的发展，涵盖其基础理论、应用案例及未来挑战。 Tran Cao Son,Enrico Pontelli,Marcello Balduccini,Torsten Schaub cs.AI

authors_text: Xiangru Zhu,Zhixu Li,Xiaodan Wang,Xueyao Jiang,Penglei Sun,Xuwu Wang,Yanghua Xiao,Nicholas Jing Yuan
title: Multi-Modal Knowledge Graph Construction and Application: A Survey
title_zh: 多模态知识图谱构建与应用：调查
comment: 20 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables. Accepted by TKDE 2022
comments: 20 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables. Accepted by TKDE 2022
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the resurgence of knowledge engineering which is featured by the fast growth of knowledge graphs. However, most of existing knowledge graphs are represented with pure symbols, which hurts the machine's capability to understand the real world. The multi-modalization of knowledge graphs is an inevitable key step towards the realization of human-level machine intelligence. The results of this endeavor are Multi-modal Knowledge Graphs (MMKGs). In this survey on MMKGs constructed by texts and images, we first give definitions of MMKGs, followed with the preliminaries on multi-modal tasks and techniques. We then systematically review the challenges, progresses and opportunities on the construction and application of MMKGs respectively, with detailed analyses of the strength and weakness of different solutions. We finalize this survey with open research problems relevant to MMKGs.

We then systematically review the challenges, progresses and opportunities on the construction and application of MMKGs respectively, with detailed analyses of the strength and weakness of different solutions. We finalize this survey with open research problems relevant to MMKGs.
abstract_zh: 近年来，知识工程重新兴起，其特点是知识图的快速增长。然而，现有的知识图谱大多用纯符号表示，这损害了机器理解现实世界的能力。知识图谱的多模态化是实现人类级别机器智能必然的关键一步。这项努力的成果是多模态知识图（MMKG）。在这项由文本和图像构建的 MMKG 的调查中，我们首先给出了 MMKG 的定义，然后对多模态任务和技术进行了初步介绍。然后，我们分别系统地回顾了MMKG的构建和应用所面临的挑战、进展和机遇，并详细分析了不同解决方案的优缺点。我们通过与 MMKG 相关的开放研究问题完成了这项调查。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多模态知识图谱（MMKGs）的构建与应用，分析了其挑战、进展及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 传统知识图谱以纯符号表示，难以让机器理解真实世界，因此需要多模态知识图谱来提升机器智能水平。
AI.method: 本文首先定义了多模态知识图谱，介绍了多模态任务和相关技术，然后系统回顾了其构建和应用中的挑战、进展及不同解决方案的优缺点。
AI.result: 总结了多模态知识图谱在构建和应用方面的现状，并指出了当前研究的不足和未来的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 多模态知识图谱是实现人类水平机器智能的关键步骤，未来的研究应关注其构建和应用中的开放性问题。

title: Privately Estimating Graph Parameters in Sublinear time
title_zh: 在次线性时间内私下估计图参数
abstract: We initiate a systematic study of algorithms that are both differentially private and run in sublinear time for several problems in which the goal is to estimate natural graph parameters. Our main result is a differentially-private $(1+ρ)$-approximation algorithm for the problem of computing the average degree of a graph, for every $ρ>0$. The running time of the algorithm is roughly the same as its non-private version proposed by Goldreich and Ron (Sublinear Algorithms, 2005). We also obtain the first differentially-private sublinear-time approximation algorithms for the maximum matching size and the minimum vertex cover size of a graph. An overarching technique we employ is the notion of coupled global sensitivity of randomized algorithms. Related variants of this notion of sensitivity have been used in the literature in ad-hoc ways. Here we formalize the notion and develop it as a unifying framework for privacy analysis of randomized approximation algorithms.
summary: We initiate a systematic study of algorithms that are both differentially private and run in sublinear time for several problems in which the goal is to estimate natural graph parameters. Our main result is a differentially-private $(1+ρ)$-approximation algorithm for the problem of computing the average degree of a graph, for every $ρ>0$. The running time of the algorithm is roughly the same as its non-private version proposed by Goldreich and Ron (Sublinear Algorithms, 2005). We also obtain the first differentially-private sublinear-time approximation algorithms for the maximum matching size and the minimum vertex cover size of a graph. An overarching technique we employ is the notion of coupled global sensitivity of randomized algorithms. Related variants of this notion of sensitivity have been used in the literature in ad-hoc ways. Here we formalize the notion and develop it as a unifying framework for privacy analysis of randomized approximation algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们启动了对算法的系统研究，这些算法既是差分私有的，又是在亚线性时间内运行的，以解决几个问题，其中的目标是估计自然图参数。我们的主要结果是一个差分隐私 $(1+ρ)$ 近似算法，用于计算图的平均度问题，对于每个 $ρ>0$。该算法的运行时间与 Goldreich 和 Ron 提出的非私有版本大致相同（子线性算法，2005）。我们还获得了第一个用于图的最大匹配大小和最小顶点覆盖大小的差分隐私亚线性时间近似算法。我们采用的首要技术是随机算法的耦合全局敏感性的概念。这种敏感性概念的相关变体已在文献中以特别的方式使用。在这里，我们形式化了这个概念，并将其开发为随机近似算法隐私分析的统一框架。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发能够在亚线性时间内运行且满足差分隐私的算法，用于估计图的关键参数。
AI.motivation: 传统图参数估计算法可能缺乏隐私保护，而现有隐私保护方法往往牺牲效率，需同时满足隐私与效率需求。
AI.method: 提出耦合全局敏感度概念，将其形式化为统一框架，用于分析随机近似算法的隐私性。
AI.result: 设计了首个差分隐私亚线性时间算法，可近似计算平均度数、最大匹配及最小顶点覆盖，其中平均度数算法达到(1+ρ)近似比。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为高效隐私保护图算法设计提供了理论基础，并验证了其在多类图问题中的有效性。

title: Visualising Multiplayer Game Spaces
title_zh: 可视化多人游戏空间
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, Accepted for IEEE Transactions on Games
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures, Accepted for IEEE Transactions on Games
abstract: We compare four different `game-spaces' in terms of their usefulness in characterising multi-player tabletop games, with a particular interest in any underlying change to a game's characteristics as the number of players changes. In each case we take a 16-dimensional feature space, and reduce it to a 2-dimensional visualizable landscape. We find that a space obtained from optimization of parameters in Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is the most directly interpretable to characterise our set of games in terms of the relative importance of imperfect information, adversarial opponents and reward sparsity. These results do not correlate with a space defined using attributes of the game-tree. This dimensionality reduction does not show any general effect as the number of players. We therefore consider the question using the original features to classify the games into two sets; those for which the characteristics of the game changes significantly as the number of players changes, and those for which there is no such effect.
summary: We compare four different `game-spaces' in terms of their usefulness in characterising multi-player tabletop games, with a particular interest in any underlying change to a game's characteristics as the number of players changes. In each case we take a 16-dimensional feature space, and reduce it to a 2-dimensional visualizable landscape. We find that a space obtained from optimization of parameters in Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is the most directly interpretable to characterise our set of games in terms of the relative importance of imperfect information, adversarial opponents and reward sparsity. These results do not correlate with a space defined using attributes of the game-tree. This dimensionality reduction does not show any general effect as the number of players. We therefore consider the question using the original features to classify the games into two sets; those for which the characteristics of the game changes significantly as the number of players changes, and those for which there is no such effect.
abstract_zh: 我们比较了四种不同的“游戏空间”在表征多人桌面游戏方面的有用性，特别关注随着玩家数量的变化而对游戏特征的任何潜在变化。在每种情况下，我们都采用 16 维特征空间，并将其简化为 2 维可视化景观。我们发现，通过蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）参数优化获得的空间是最直接可解释的，可以根据不完美信息、对抗性对手和奖励稀疏性的相对重要性来描述我们的游戏集。这些结果与使用博弈树的属性定义的空间无关。这种降维并没有表现出与玩家数量一样的任何一般效果。因此，我们考虑使用原始特征将游戏分为两组的问题；那些游戏的特征随着玩家数量的变化而显着变化的，以及那些没有这种影响的。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过比较四种游戏空间，研究多人桌游特征随玩家数量变化的情况，并利用降维技术可视化分析。
AI.motivation: 探索不同游戏空间对多人桌游特征的表征能力，特别是玩家数量变化对游戏特性的影响，以寻找更有效的分析方法。
AI.method: 将16维特征空间通过降维技术转化为2维可视化景观，对比四种游戏空间（包括蒙特卡洛树搜索参数优化空间和游戏树属性空间）的解释性差异，并基于原始特征对游戏进行分类。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛树搜索参数优化空间最能解释游戏的不完美信息、对抗性对手和奖励稀疏性，且与游戏树属性空间无相关性；玩家数量变化对游戏特性无普遍影响，需将游戏分为两类。
AI.conclusion: 基于MCTS参数优化的游戏空间更适于表征游戏特性，而玩家数量变化的影响需通过分类分析具体游戏来判断。

authors_text: Emily Wenger,Francesca Falzon,Josephine Passananti,Haitao Zheng,Ben Y. Zhao
title: Assessing Privacy Risks from Feature Vector Reconstruction Attacks
title_zh: 评估特征向量重建攻击带来的隐私风险
abstract: In deep neural networks for facial recognition, feature vectors are numerical representations that capture the unique features of a given face. While it is known that a version of the original face can be recovered via "feature reconstruction," we lack an understanding of the end-to-end privacy risks produced by these attacks. In this work, we address this shortcoming by developing metrics that meaningfully capture the threat of reconstructed face images. Using end-to-end experiments and user studies, we show that reconstructed face images enable re-identification by both commercial facial recognition systems and humans, at a rate that is at worst, a factor of four times higher than randomized baselines. Our results confirm that feature vectors should be recognized as Personal Identifiable Information (PII) in order to protect user privacy.
summary: In deep neural networks for facial recognition, feature vectors are numerical representations that capture the unique features of a given face. While it is known that a version of the original face can be recovered via "feature reconstruction," we lack an understanding of the end-to-end privacy risks produced by these attacks. In this work, we address this shortcoming by developing metrics that meaningfully capture the threat of reconstructed face images. Using end-to-end experiments and user studies, we show that reconstructed face images enable re-identification by both commercial facial recognition systems and humans, at a rate that is at worst, a factor of four times higher than randomized baselines. Our results confirm that feature vectors should be recognized as Personal Identifiable Information (PII) in order to protect user privacy.
abstract_zh: 在用于面部识别的深度神经网络中，特征向量是捕获给定面部的独特特征的数值表示。虽然众所周知，可以通过“特征重建”来恢复原始面部的版本，但我们对这些攻击产生的端到端隐私风险缺乏了解。在这项工作中，我们通过开发有意义地捕获重建面部图像的威胁的指标来解决这一缺点。通过端到端实验和用户研究，我们表明，重建的面部图像可以被商业面部识别系统和人类重新识别，最坏的情况是比随机基线高四倍。我们的结果证实，特征向量应被识别为个人身份信息（PII），以保护用户隐私。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了深度神经网络中特征向量重建攻击的隐私风险，开发了量化重建人脸图像威胁的指标。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对特征向量重建攻击导致的端到端隐私风险的系统性评估，需明确其实际威胁程度。
AI.method: 通过构建指标衡量重建图像威胁，结合端到端实验与用户研究，对比商业系统及人类的再识别准确率。
AI.result: 重建图像使再识别准确率较随机基线最高提升4倍，证实特征向量具备个人身份信息（PII）属性。
AI.conclusion: 应将特征向量视为PII进行保护，以防范重建攻击带来的隐私泄露风险。

authors_text: Tassadaq Hussain,Muhammad Diyan,Mandar Gogate,Kia Dashtipour,Ahsan Adeel,Yu Tsao,Amir Hussain
title: A Novel Speech Intelligibility Enhancement Model based on CanonicalCorrelation and Deep Learning
title_zh: 基于规范相关和深度学习的新型语音清晰度增强模型
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.04172
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.04172
abstract: Current deep learning (DL) based approaches to speech intelligibility enhancement in noisy environments are often trained to minimise the feature distance between noise-free speech and enhanced speech signals. Despite improving the speech quality, such approaches do not deliver required levels of speech intelligibility in everyday noisy environments . Intelligibility-oriented (I-O) loss functions have recently been developed to train DL approaches for robust speech enhancement. Here, we formulate, for the first time, a novel canonical correlation based I-O loss function to more effectively train DL algorithms. Specifically, we present a canonical-correlation based short-time objective intelligibility (CC-STOI) cost function to train a fully convolutional neural network (FCN) model. We carry out comparative simulation experiments to show that our CC-STOI based speech enhancement framework outperforms state-of-the-art DL models trained with conventional distance-based and STOI-based loss functions, using objective and subjective evaluation measures for case of both unseen speakers and noises. Ongoing future work is evaluating the proposed approach for design of robust hearing-assistive technology.
summary: Current deep learning (DL) based approaches to speech intelligibility enhancement in noisy environments are often trained to minimise the feature distance between noise-free speech and enhanced speech signals. Despite improving the speech quality, such approaches do not deliver required levels of speech intelligibility in everyday noisy environments . Intelligibility-oriented (I-O) loss functions have recently been developed to train DL approaches for robust speech enhancement. Here, we formulate, for the first time, a novel canonical correlation based I-O loss function to more effectively train DL algorithms. Specifically, we present a canonical-correlation based short-time objective intelligibility (CC-STOI) cost function to train a fully convolutional neural network (FCN) model. We carry out comparative simulation experiments to show that our CC-STOI based speech enhancement framework outperforms state-of-the-art DL models trained with conventional distance-based and STOI-based loss functions, using objective and subjective evaluation measures for case of both unseen speakers and noises. Ongoing future work is evaluating the proposed approach for design of robust hearing-assistive technology.
abstract_zh: 当前基于深度学习 (DL) 的噪声环境中语音清晰度增强方法通常经过训练，以最小化无噪声语音和增强语音信号之间的特征距离。尽管提高了语音质量，但此类方法无法在日常嘈杂环境中提供所需的语音清晰度水平。最近开发了面向清晰度 (I-O) 损失函数来训练 DL 方法以实现稳健的语音增强。在这里，我们首次制定了一种新颖的基于典型相关性的 I-O 损失函数，以更有效地训练深度学习算法。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于规范相关性的短时目标可懂度（CC-STOI）成本函数来训练全卷积神经网络（FCN）模型。我们进行了比较模拟实验，结果表明，我们基于 CC-STOI 的语音增强框架优于使用传统基于距离和基于 STOI 损失函数训练的最先进的 DL 模型，并对看不见的说话者和噪声的情况使用客观和主观评估措施。未来正在进行的工作正在评估所提出的稳健助听技术设计方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于典型相关和深度学习的语音可懂度增强模型
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在噪声环境中无法有效提升语音可懂度，需开发更有效的损失函数
AI.method: 设计基于典型相关短时客观可懂度（CC-STOI）的损失函数，结合全卷积神经网络进行训练
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在客观和主观评估中优于现有模型，适用于新说话人和噪声
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升语音可懂度，未来可用于助听技术开发
