Here, we formulate, for the first time, a novel canonical correlation based I-O loss function to more effectively train DL algorithms. Specifically, we present a canonical-correlation based short-time objective intelligibility (CC-STOI) cost function to train a fully convolutional neural network (FCN) model. We carry out comparative simulation experiments to show that our CC-STOI based speech enhancement framework outperforms state-of-the-art DL models trained with conventional distance-based and STOI-based loss functions, using objective and subjective evaluation measures for case of both unseen speakers and noises. Ongoing future work is evaluating the proposed approach for design of robust hearing-assistive technology. 当前基于深度学习 (DL) 的噪声环境中语音清晰度增强方法通常经过训练，以最小化无噪声语音和增强语音信号之间的特征距离。尽管提高了语音质量，但此类方法无法在日常嘈杂环境中提供所需的语音清晰度水平。最近开发了面向清晰度 (I-O) 损失函数来训练 DL 方法以实现稳健的语音增强。在这里，我们首次制定了一种新颖的基于典型相关性的 I-O 损失函数，以更有效地训练深度学习算法。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于规范相关性的短时目标可懂度（CC-STOI）成本函数来训练全卷积神经网络（FCN）模型。我们进行了比较模拟实验，结果表明，我们基于 CC-STOI 的语音增强框架优于使用传统基于距离和基于 STOI 损失函数训练的最先进的 DL 模型，并对看不见的说话者和噪声的情况使用客观和主观评估措施。未来正在进行的工作正在评估所提出的稳健助听技术设计方法。 提出一种基于典型相关和深度学习的语音可懂度增强模型 Tassadaq Hussain,Muhammad Diyan,Mandar Gogate,Kia Dashtipour,Ahsan Adeel,Yu Tsao,Amir Hussain cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Guangyu Shen,Yingqi Liu,Guanhong Tao,Qiuling Xu,Zhuo Zhang,Shengwei An,Shiqing Ma,Xiangyu Zhang
title: Constrained Optimization with Dynamic Bound-scaling for Effective NLPBackdoor Defense
title_zh: 通过动态边界缩放进行约束优化，实现有效的 NLP 后门防御
abstract: We develop a novel optimization method for NLPbackdoor inversion. We leverage a dynamically reducing temperature coefficient in the softmax function to provide changing loss landscapes to the optimizer such that the process gradually focuses on the ground truth trigger, which is denoted as a one-hot value in a convex hull. Our method also features a temperature rollback mechanism to step away from local optimals, exploiting the observation that local optimals can be easily deter-mined in NLP trigger inversion (while not in general optimization). We evaluate the technique on over 1600 models (with roughly half of them having injected backdoors) on 3 prevailing NLP tasks, with 4 different backdoor attacks and 7 architectures. Our results show that the technique is able to effectively and efficiently detect and remove backdoors, outperforming 4 baseline methods.
summary: We develop a novel optimization method for NLPbackdoor inversion. We leverage a dynamically reducing temperature coefficient in the softmax function to provide changing loss landscapes to the optimizer such that the process gradually focuses on the ground truth trigger, which is denoted as a one-hot value in a convex hull. Our method also features a temperature rollback mechanism to step away from local optimals, exploiting the observation that local optimals can be easily deter-mined in NLP trigger inversion (while not in general optimization). We evaluate the technique on over 1600 models (with roughly half of them having injected backdoors) on 3 prevailing NLP tasks, with 4 different backdoor attacks and 7 architectures. Our results show that the technique is able to effectively and efficiently detect and remove backdoors, outperforming 4 baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种新颖的 NLP 后门反演优化方法。我们利用 softmax 函数中动态降低的温度系数为优化器提供不断变化的损失景观，以便该过程逐渐关注地面实况触发器，该触发器在凸包中表示为单热值。我们的方法还具有温度回滚机制，以远离局部最优，利用在 NLP 触发反演中可以轻松确定局部最优的观察结果（而不是在一般优化中）。我们在 3 个流行的 NLP 任务上的 1600 多个模型（其中大约一半已注入后门）上评估了该技术，其中包括 4 种不同的后门攻击和 7 种架构。我们的结果表明，该技术能够有效且高效地检测和删除后门，优于 4 种基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态边界缩放的约束优化方法，用于有效防御NLP后门攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有NLP后门检测方法存在效率低下或漏检率高的问题，需更精准的触发器定位技术。
AI.method: 通过动态降低softmax温度系数改变损失函数形态，并引入温度回滚机制逃离局部最优，逐步聚焦真实触发器。
AI.result: 在1600+模型的3大任务测试中，该方法在4种后门攻击下均优于4种基线方法，实现高效检测与清除。
AI.conclusion: 动态优化策略能有效应对NLP后门攻击，其温度调节机制与回滚设计对触发器逆向具有显著优势。

title: Borrowing from yourself: Faster future video segmentation with partial channel update
title_zh: 借鉴自己：通过部分频道更新加快未来视频分割速度
abstract: Semantic segmentation is a well-addressed topic in the computer vision literature, but the design of fast and accurate video processing networks remains challenging. In addition, to run on embedded hardware, computer vision models often have to make compromises on accuracy to run at the required speed, so that a latency/accuracy trade-off is usually at the heart of these real-time systems' design. For the specific case of videos, models have the additional possibility to make use of computations made for previous frames to mitigate the accuracy loss while being real-time. In this work, we propose to tackle the task of fast future video segmentation prediction through the use of convolutional layers with time-dependent channel masking. This technique only updates a chosen subset of the feature maps at each time-step, bringing simultaneously less computation and latency, and allowing the network to leverage previously computed features. We apply this technique to several fast architectures and experimentally confirm its benefits for the future prediction subtask.
summary: Semantic segmentation is a well-addressed topic in the computer vision literature, but the design of fast and accurate video processing networks remains challenging. In addition, to run on embedded hardware, computer vision models often have to make compromises on accuracy to run at the required speed, so that a latency/accuracy trade-off is usually at the heart of these real-time systems' design. For the specific case of videos, models have the additional possibility to make use of computations made for previous frames to mitigate the accuracy loss while being real-time. In this work, we propose to tackle the task of fast future video segmentation prediction through the use of convolutional layers with time-dependent channel masking. This technique only updates a chosen subset of the feature maps at each time-step, bringing simultaneously less computation and latency, and allowing the network to leverage previously computed features. We apply this technique to several fast architectures and experimentally confirm its benefits for the future prediction subtask.
abstract_zh: 语义分割是计算机视觉文献中一个备受关注的主题，但快速准确的视频处理网络的设计仍然具有挑战性。此外，为了在嵌入式硬件上运行，计算机视觉模型通常必须在精度上做出妥协才能以所需的速度运行，因此延迟/精度权衡通常是这些实时系统设计的核心。对于视频的特定情况，模型还可以利用对先前帧进行的计算来减轻实时性的准确性损失。在这项工作中，我们建议通过使用具有时间相关通道掩蔽的卷积层来解决未来快速视频分割预测的任务。该技术仅在每个时间步更新选定的特征图子集，同时减少计算和延迟，并允许网络利用先前计算的特征。我们将该技术应用于几种快速架构，并通过实验确认其对未来预测子任务的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过时间依赖通道掩码的卷积层实现快速未来视频分割的方法，仅在每个时间步更新部分特征图以减少计算量和延迟。
AI.motivation: 视频分割模型在嵌入式硬件上运行时需在速度与精度间权衡，而现有方法难以兼顾实时性与准确性。利用前帧计算结果可缓解精度损失，但缺乏有效技术实现。
AI.method: 设计时间依赖通道掩码机制，通过动态选择部分特征图进行更新，在降低计算量的同时复用历史特征信息，应用于多种快速架构中。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在保持分割精度的前提下显著提升了未来帧预测的效率，证明了部分通道更新策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过智能特征复用机制，在不牺牲精度的情况下实现了视频分割的实时性突破，为嵌入式视觉系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jie Wang,Yuji Liu,Binling Wang,Yiming Zhi,Song Li1,Shipeng Xia,Jiayang Zhang,Lin Li1,Qingyang Hong,Feng Tong
title: The xmuspeech system for multi-channel multi-party meeting transcription challenge
title_zh: 多渠道多方会议转录挑战的xmuspeech系统
abstract: This paper describes the system developed by the XMUSPEECH team for the Multi-channel Multi-party Meeting Transcription Challenge (M2MeT). For the speaker diarization task, we propose a multi-channel speaker diarization system that obtains spatial information of speaker by Difference of Arrival (DOA) technology. Speaker-spatial embedding is generated by x-vector and s-vector derived from Filter-and-Sum Beamforming (FSB) which makes the embedding more robust. Specifically, we propose a novel multi-channel sequence-to-sequence neural network architecture named Discriminative Multi-stream Neural Network (DMSNet) which consists of Attention Filter-and-Sum block (AFSB) and Conformer encoder. We explore DMSNet to address overlapped speech problem on multi-channel audio. Compared with LSTM based OSD module, we achieve a decreases of 10.1% in Detection Error Rate(DetER). By performing DMSNet based OSD module, the DER of cluster-based diarization system decrease significantly form 13.44% to 7.63%. Our best fusion system achieves 7.09% and 9.80% of the diarization error rate (DER) on evaluation set and test set.
summary: This paper describes the system developed by the XMUSPEECH team for the Multi-channel Multi-party Meeting Transcription Challenge (M2MeT). For the speaker diarization task, we propose a multi-channel speaker diarization system that obtains spatial information of speaker by Difference of Arrival (DOA) technology. Speaker-spatial embedding is generated by x-vector and s-vector derived from Filter-and-Sum Beamforming (FSB) which makes the embedding more robust. Specifically, we propose a novel multi-channel sequence-to-sequence neural network architecture named Discriminative Multi-stream Neural Network (DMSNet) which consists of Attention Filter-and-Sum block (AFSB) and Conformer encoder. We explore DMSNet to address overlapped speech problem on multi-channel audio. Compared with LSTM based OSD module, we achieve a decreases of 10.1% in Detection Error Rate(DetER). By performing DMSNet based OSD module, the DER of cluster-based diarization system decrease significantly form 13.44% to 7.63%. Our best fusion system achieves 7.09% and 9.80% of the diarization error rate (DER) on evaluation set and test set.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 XMUSPEECH 团队为多通道多方会议转录挑战赛 (M2MeT) 开发的系统。对于说话人二值化任务，我们提出了一种多通道说话人二值化系统，通过到达差异（DOA）技术获取说话人的空间信息。扬声器空间嵌入由从滤波器求和波束成形 (FSB) 派生的 x 向量和 s 向量生成，这使得嵌入更加鲁棒。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的多通道序列到序列神经网络架构，称为判别多流神经网络（DMSNet），它由注意力过滤与求和块（AFSB）和Conformer编码器组成。我们探索 DMSNet 来解决多通道音频上的重叠语音问题。与基于 LSTM 的 OSD 模块相比，我们的检测错误率 (DetER) 降低了 10.1%。通过执行基于 DMSNet 的 OSD 模块，基于集群的二值化系统的 DER 显着降低，从 13.44% 降至 7.63%。我们最好的融合系统在评估集和测试集上实现了 7.09% 和 9.80% 的二值化错误率 (DER)。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了XMUSPEECH团队为多通道多方会议转录挑战赛（M2MeT）开发的系统，重点解决多通道环境下的说话人分离与重叠语音处理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多通道语音场景中难以有效处理重叠语音和空间信息，导致说话人分离准确率不足，需提升系统鲁棒性与多通道数据利用效率。
AI.method: 提出基于到达时间差（DOA）技术的多通道说话人分离系统，结合滤波求和波束成形（FSB）生成说话人-空间嵌入；设计多通道序列到序列模型DMSNet，包含注意力滤波求和块（AFSB）和Conformer编码器，优化重叠语音处理。
AI.result: DMSNet使检测误差率（DetER）降低10.1%，基于聚类的分离系统DER从13.44%降至7.63%；最终融合系统在评估集和测试集上分别达到7.09%和9.80%的DER。
AI.conclusion: DMSNet通过多通道空间信息建模与新型网络架构显著提升了多通道会议场景下的说话人分离性能，验证了方法在复杂语音环境中的有效性。

search_text: The xmuspeech system for multi-channel multi-party meeting transcription challenge 多渠道多方会议转录挑战的xmuspeech系统 This paper describes the system developed by the XMUSPEECH team for the Multi-channel Multi-party Meeting Transcription Challenge (M2MeT). For the speaker diarization task, we propose a multi-channel speaker diarization system that obtains spatial information of speaker by Difference of Arrival (DOA) technology. Speaker-spatial embedding is generated by x-vector and s-vector derived from Filter-and-Sum Beamforming (FSB) which makes the embedding more robust. Specifically, we propose a novel multi-channel sequence-to-sequence neural network architecture named Discriminative Multi-stream Neural Network (DMSNet) which consists of Attention Filter-and-Sum block (AFSB) and Conformer encoder. We explore DMSNet to address overlapped speech problem on multi-channel audio. Compared with LSTM based OSD module, we achieve a decreases of 10.1% in Detection Error Rate(DetER). By performing DMSNet based OSD module, the DER of cluster-based diarization system decrease significantly form 13.44% to 7.63%. Our best fusion system achieves 7.09% and 9.80% of the diarization error rate (DER) on evaluation set and test set. 本文介绍了 XMUSPEECH 团队为多通道多方会议转录挑战赛 (M2MeT) 开发的系统。对于说话人二值化任务，我们提出了一种多通道说话人二值化系统，通过到达差异（DOA）技术获取说话人的空间信息。扬声器空间嵌入由从滤波器求和波束成形 (FSB) 派生的 x 向量和 s 向量生成，这使得嵌入更加鲁棒。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的多通道序列到序列神经网络架构，称为判别多流神经网络（DMSNet），它由注意力过滤与求和块（AFSB）和Conformer编码器组成。我们探索 DMSNet 来解决多通道音频上的重叠语音问题。与基于 LSTM 的 OSD 模块相比，我们的检测错误率 (DetER) 降低了 10.1%。通过执行基于 DMSNet 的 OSD 模块，基于集群的二值化系统的 DER 显着降低，从 13.44% 降至 7.63%。我们最好的融合系统在评估集和测试集上实现了 7.09% 和 9.80% 的二值化错误率 (DER)。 本文介绍了XMUSPEECH团队为多通道多方会议转录挑战赛（M2MeT）开发的系统，重点解决多通道环境下的说话人分离与重叠语音处理问题。 Jie Wang,Yuji Liu,Binling Wang,Yiming Zhi,Song Li1,Shipeng Xia,Jiayang Zhang,Lin Li1,Qingyang Hong,Feng Tong eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Yingfeng Cai,Junqiao Zhao,Jiafeng Cui,Fenglin Zhang,Chen Ye,Tiantian Feng
title: Patch-NetVLAD+: Learned patch descriptor and weighted matching strategy for place recognition
title_zh: Patch-NetVLAD+：用于地点识别的学习补丁描述符和加权匹配策略
abstract: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) in areas with similar scenes such as urban or indoor scenarios is a major challenge. Existing VPR methods using global descriptors have difficulty capturing local specific regions (LSR) in the scene and are therefore prone to localization confusion in such scenarios. As a result, finding the LSR that are critical for location recognition becomes key. To address this challenge, we introduced Patch-NetVLAD+, which was inspired by patch-based VPR researches. Our method proposed a fine-tuning strategy with triplet loss to make NetVLAD suitable for extracting patch-level descriptors. Moreover, unlike existing methods that treat all patches in an image equally, our method extracts patches of LSR, which present less frequently throughout the dataset, and makes them play an important role in VPR by assigning proper weights to them. Experiments on Pittsburgh30k and Tokyo247 datasets show that our approach achieved up to 6.35\% performance improvement than existing patch-based methods.
summary: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) in areas with similar scenes such as urban or indoor scenarios is a major challenge. Existing VPR methods using global descriptors have difficulty capturing local specific regions (LSR) in the scene and are therefore prone to localization confusion in such scenarios. As a result, finding the LSR that are critical for location recognition becomes key. To address this challenge, we introduced Patch-NetVLAD+, which was inspired by patch-based VPR researches. Our method proposed a fine-tuning strategy with triplet loss to make NetVLAD suitable for extracting patch-level descriptors. Moreover, unlike existing methods that treat all patches in an image equally, our method extracts patches of LSR, which present less frequently throughout the dataset, and makes them play an important role in VPR by assigning proper weights to them. Experiments on Pittsburgh30k and Tokyo247 datasets show that our approach achieved up to 6.35\% performance improvement than existing patch-based methods.
abstract_zh: 具有相似场景（例如城市或室内场景）的区域中的视觉地点识别（VPR）是一个重大挑战。现有的使用全局描述符的 VPR 方法难以捕获场景中的局部特定区域 (LSR)，因此在此类场景中容易出现定位混乱。因此，找到对位置识别至关重要的LSR就成为关键。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 Patch-NetVLAD+，它的灵感来自于基于补丁的 VPR 研究。我们的方法提出了一种带有三元组损失的微调策略，使 NetVLAD 适合提取补丁级描述符。此外，与平等对待图像中所有补丁的现有方法不同，我们的方法提取 LSR 补丁，这些补丁在整个数据集中出现频率较低，并通过为它们分配适当的权重，使它们在 VPR 中发挥重要作用。 Pittsburgh30k 和 Tokyo247 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法比现有的基于补丁的方法实现了高达 6.35% 的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Patch-NetVLAD+方法，通过改进的局部特征描述和加权匹配策略，解决相似场景下的视觉地点识别挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于全局描述符的视觉地点识别方法难以捕捉场景中的局部特定区域（LSR），导致在城市或室内等相似场景中定位混淆。
AI.method: 设计基于三元组损失的微调策略，使NetVLAD适应补丁级描述符提取；对数据集中较少出现的LSR补丁赋予更高权重，改进匹配策略。
AI.result: 在Pittsburgh30k和Tokyo247数据集上，相比现有补丁级方法性能提升最高达6.35%。
AI.conclusion: 通过关注关键局部区域并引入加权机制，本文方法有效提升了相似场景下的视觉地点识别准确率。

search_text: Patch-NetVLAD+: Learned patch descriptor and weighted matching strategy for place recognition Patch-NetVLAD+：用于地点识别的学习补丁描述符和加权匹配策略 Visual Place Recognition (VPR) in areas with similar scenes such as urban or indoor scenarios is a major challenge. Existing VPR methods using global descriptors have difficulty capturing local specific regions (LSR) in the scene and are therefore prone to localization confusion in such scenarios. As a result, finding the LSR that are critical for location recognition becomes key. To address this challenge, we introduced Patch-NetVLAD+, which was inspired by patch-based VPR researches. Our method proposed a fine-tuning strategy with triplet loss to make NetVLAD suitable for extracting patch-level descriptors. Moreover, unlike existing methods that treat all patches in an image equally, our method extracts patches of LSR, which present less frequently throughout the dataset, and makes them play an important role in VPR by assigning proper weights to them. Experiments on Pittsburgh30k and Tokyo247 datasets show that our approach achieved up to 6.35\% performance improvement than existing patch-based methods. 具有相似场景（例如城市或室内场景）的区域中的视觉地点识别（VPR）是一个重大挑战。现有的使用全局描述符的 VPR 方法难以捕获场景中的局部特定区域 (LSR)，因此在此类场景中容易出现定位混乱。因此，找到对位置识别至关重要的LSR就成为关键。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 Patch-NetVLAD+，它的灵感来自于基于补丁的 VPR 研究。我们的方法提出了一种带有三元组损失的微调策略，使 NetVLAD 适合提取补丁级描述符。此外，与平等对待图像中所有补丁的现有方法不同，我们的方法提取 LSR 补丁，这些补丁在整个数据集中出现频率较低，并通过为它们分配适当的权重，使它们在 VPR 中发挥重要作用。 Pittsburgh30k 和 Tokyo247 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法比现有的基于补丁的方法实现了高达 6.35% 的性能提升。 本文提出Patch-NetVLAD+方法，通过改进的局部特征描述和加权匹配策略，解决相似场景下的视觉地点识别挑战。 Yingfeng Cai,Junqiao Zhao,Jiafeng Cui,Fenglin Zhang,Chen Ye,Tiantian Feng cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Deep soccer captioning with transformer: dataset, semantics-related losses, and multi-level evaluation
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行深度足球字幕：数据集、语义相关损失和多级评估
abstract: This work aims at generating captions for soccer videos using deep learning. In this context, this paper introduces a dataset, model, and triple-level evaluation. The dataset consists of 22k caption-clip pairs and three visual features (images, optical flow, inpainting) for ~500 hours of \emph{SoccerNet} videos. The model is divided into three parts: a transformer learns language, ConvNets learn vision, and a fusion of linguistic and visual features generates captions. The paper suggests evaluating generated captions at three levels: syntax (the commonly used evaluation metrics such as BLEU-score and CIDEr), meaning (the quality of descriptions for a domain expert), and corpus (the diversity of generated captions). The paper shows that the diversity of generated captions has improved (from 0.07 reaching 0.18) with semantics-related losses that prioritize selected words. Semantics-related losses and the utilization of more visual features (optical flow, inpainting) improved the normalized captioning score by 28\%. The web page of this work: https://sites.google.com/view/soccercaptioning}{https://sites.google.com/view/soccercaptioning
summary: This work aims at generating captions for soccer videos using deep learning. In this context, this paper introduces a dataset, model, and triple-level evaluation. The dataset consists of 22k caption-clip pairs and three visual features (images, optical flow, inpainting) for ~500 hours of \emph{SoccerNet} videos. The model is divided into three parts: a transformer learns language, ConvNets learn vision, and a fusion of linguistic and visual features generates captions. The paper suggests evaluating generated captions at three levels: syntax (the commonly used evaluation metrics such as BLEU-score and CIDEr), meaning (the quality of descriptions for a domain expert), and corpus (the diversity of generated captions). The paper shows that the diversity of generated captions has improved (from 0.07 reaching 0.18) with semantics-related losses that prioritize selected words. Semantics-related losses and the utilization of more visual features (optical flow, inpainting) improved the normalized captioning score by 28\%. The web page of this work: https://sites.google.com/view/soccercaptioning}{https://sites.google.com/view/soccercaptioning
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在使用深度学习为足球视频生成字幕。在此背景下，本文介绍了数据集、模型和三级评估。该数据集包含约 500 小时的 \emph{SoccerNet} 视频的 22k 个字幕剪辑对和三个视觉特征（图像、光流、修复）。该模型分为三个部分：变压器学习语言，ConvNets 学习视觉，以及语言和视觉特征的融合生成字幕。该论文建议从三个层面评估生成的字幕：语法（BLEU-score 和 CIDEr 等常用的评估指标）、含义（领域专家的描述质量）和语料库（生成的字幕的多样性）。该论文表明，生成的标题的多样性有所改善（从 0.07 达到 0.18），语义相关的损失优先考虑了所选单词。语义相关的损失和更多视觉特征（光流、修复）的利用将标准化字幕得分提高了 28%。本作品网页：https://sites.google.com/view/soccercaptioning}{https://sites.google.com/view/soccercaptioning

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的深度学习方法，用于生成足球视频的字幕，并引入了一个数据集和三层次的评估体系。
AI.motivation: 生成足球视频字幕需要同时理解视觉内容和语言表达，传统方法在多样性和语义准确性上存在不足，因此需要一种更全面的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文的方法包括使用Transformer学习语言，使用卷积神经网络学习视觉内容，并融合语言和视觉特征生成字幕。同时引入了语义相关的损失函数和三层次评估体系（语法、意义和语料库）。
AI.result: 使用语义相关损失和更多视觉特征（光流、修复）使生成字幕的多样性提高了120%，归一化字幕得分提高了28%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过引入语义相关损失和多视觉特征，显著提升了足球视频字幕生成的质量和多样性，为视频字幕生成提供了新的研究方向。

search_text: Deep soccer captioning with transformer: dataset, semantics-related losses, and multi-level evaluation 使用 Transformer 进行深度足球字幕：数据集、语义相关损失和多级评估 This work aims at generating captions for soccer videos using deep learning. In this context, this paper introduces a dataset, model, and triple-level evaluation. The dataset consists of 22k caption-clip pairs and three visual features (images, optical flow, inpainting) for ~500 hours of \emph{SoccerNet} videos. The model is divided into three parts: a transformer learns language, ConvNets learn vision, and a fusion of linguistic and visual features generates captions. The paper suggests evaluating generated captions at three levels: syntax (the commonly used evaluation metrics such as BLEU-score and CIDEr), meaning (the quality of descriptions for a domain expert), and corpus (the diversity of generated captions). The paper shows that the diversity of generated captions has improved (from 0.07 reaching 0.18) with semantics-related losses that prioritize selected words. Semantics-related losses and the utilization of more visual features (optical flow, inpainting) improved the normalized captioning score by 28\%. The web page of this work: https://sites.google.com/view/soccercaptioning}{https://sites.google.com/view/soccercaptioning 这项工作旨在使用深度学习为足球视频生成字幕。在此背景下，本文介绍了数据集、模型和三级评估。该数据集包含约 500 小时的 \emph{SoccerNet} 视频的 22k 个字幕剪辑对和三个视觉特征（图像、光流、修复）。该模型分为三个部分：变压器学习语言，ConvNets 学习视觉，以及语言和视觉特征的融合生成字幕。该论文建议从三个层面评估生成的字幕：语法（BLEU-score 和 CIDEr 等常用的评估指标）、含义（领域专家的描述质量）和语料库（生成的字幕的多样性）。该论文表明，生成的标题的多样性有所改善（从 0.07 达到 0.18），语义相关的损失优先考虑了所选单词。语义相关的损失和更多视觉特征（光流、修复）的利用将标准化字幕得分提高了 28%。本作品网页：https://sites.google.com/view/soccercaptioning}{https://sites.google.com/view/soccercaptioning 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的深度学习方法，用于生成足球视频的字幕，并引入了一个数据集和三层次的评估体系。 Ahmad Hammoudeh,Bastien Vanderplaetse,Stéphane Dupont cs.CV,cs.AI

title: On the Detection of Adaptive Adversarial Attacks in Speaker Verification Systems
title_zh: 说话人验证系统中自适应对抗攻击的检测
abstract: Speaker verification systems have been widely used in smart phones and Internet of things devices to identify legitimate users. In recent work, it has been shown that adversarial attacks, such as FAKEBOB, can work effectively against speaker verification systems. The goal of this paper is to design a detector that can distinguish an original audio from an audio contaminated by adversarial attacks. Specifically, our designed detector, called MEH-FEST, calculates the minimum energy in high frequencies from the short-time Fourier transform of an audio and uses it as a detection metric. Through both analysis and experiments, we show that our proposed detector is easy to implement, fast to process an input audio, and effective in determining whether an audio is corrupted by FAKEBOB attacks. The experimental results indicate that the detector is extremely effective: with near zero false positive and false negative rates for detecting FAKEBOB attacks in Gaussian mixture model (GMM) and i-vector speaker verification systems. Moreover, adaptive adversarial attacks against our proposed detector and their countermeasures are discussed and studied, showing the game between attackers and defenders.
summary: Speaker verification systems have been widely used in smart phones and Internet of things devices to identify legitimate users. In recent work, it has been shown that adversarial attacks, such as FAKEBOB, can work effectively against speaker verification systems. The goal of this paper is to design a detector that can distinguish an original audio from an audio contaminated by adversarial attacks. Specifically, our designed detector, called MEH-FEST, calculates the minimum energy in high frequencies from the short-time Fourier transform of an audio and uses it as a detection metric. Through both analysis and experiments, we show that our proposed detector is easy to implement, fast to process an input audio, and effective in determining whether an audio is corrupted by FAKEBOB attacks. The experimental results indicate that the detector is extremely effective: with near zero false positive and false negative rates for detecting FAKEBOB attacks in Gaussian mixture model (GMM) and i-vector speaker verification systems. Moreover, adaptive adversarial attacks against our proposed detector and their countermeasures are discussed and studied, showing the game between attackers and defenders.
abstract_zh: 说话人验证系统已广泛应用于智能手机和物联网设备中，以识别合法用户。最近的研究表明，FAKEBOB 等对抗性攻击可以有效地对抗说话人验证系统。本文的目标是设计一种检测器，可以区分原始音频和受到对抗性攻击污染的音频。具体来说，我们设计的检测器（称为 MEH-FEST）通过音频的短时傅立叶变换计算高频的最小能量，并将其用作检测指标。通过分析和实验，我们表明我们提出的检测器易于实现，可以快速处理输入音频，并且可以有效确定音频是否被 FAKEBOB 攻击损坏。实验结果表明，该检测器非常有效：在高斯混合模型 (GMM) 和 i-向量说话人验证系统中检测 FAKEBOB 攻击时，误报率和漏报率几乎为零。此外，还讨论和研究了针对我们提出的检测器的自适应对抗攻击及其对策，展示了攻击者和防御者之间的博弈。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种名为MEH-FEST的检测器，用于识别语音验证系统中的自适应对抗攻击（如FAKEBOB攻击）。
AI.motivation: 现有的语音验证系统易受对抗攻击（如FAKEBOB）影响，需开发高效且易实现的检测方法以提升系统安全性。
AI.method: 通过短时傅里叶变换（STFT）计算音频高频部分的最小能量作为检测指标，构建MEH-FEST检测器。
AI.result: 实验表明，该检测器在GMM和i-vector系统中对FAKEBOB攻击的误报率和漏报率接近零，并分析了对抗攻击的适应性及防御策略。
AI.conclusion: MEH-FEST检测器在效率和效果上表现优异，但攻击者与防御者之间的对抗仍需持续研究更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Audio Defect Detection in Music with Deep Networks
title_zh: 使用深度网络检测音乐中的音频缺陷
abstract: With increasing amounts of music being digitally transferred from production to distribution, automatic means of determining media quality are needed. Protection mechanisms in digital audio processing tools have not eliminated the need of production entities located downstream the distribution chain to assess audio quality and detect defects inserted further upstream. Such analysis often relies on the received audio and scarce meta-data alone. Deliberate use of artefacts such as clicks in popular music as well as more recent defects stemming from corruption in modern audio encodings call for data-centric and context sensitive solutions for detection. We present a convolutional network architecture following end-to-end encoder decoder configuration to develop detectors for two exemplary audio defects. A click detector is trained and compared to a traditional signal processing method, with a discussion on context sensitivity. Additional post-processing is used for data augmentation and workflow simulation. The ability of our models to capture variance is explored in a detector for artefacts from decompression of corrupted MP3 compressed audio. For both tasks we describe the synthetic generation of artefacts for controlled detector training and evaluation. We evaluate our detectors on the large open-source Free Music Archive (FMA) and genre-specific datasets.
summary: With increasing amounts of music being digitally transferred from production to distribution, automatic means of determining media quality are needed. Protection mechanisms in digital audio processing tools have not eliminated the need of production entities located downstream the distribution chain to assess audio quality and detect defects inserted further upstream. Such analysis often relies on the received audio and scarce meta-data alone. Deliberate use of artefacts such as clicks in popular music as well as more recent defects stemming from corruption in modern audio encodings call for data-centric and context sensitive solutions for detection. We present a convolutional network architecture following end-to-end encoder decoder configuration to develop detectors for two exemplary audio defects. A click detector is trained and compared to a traditional signal processing method, with a discussion on context sensitivity. Additional post-processing is used for data augmentation and workflow simulation. The ability of our models to capture variance is explored in a detector for artefacts from decompression of corrupted MP3 compressed audio. For both tasks we describe the synthetic generation of artefacts for controlled detector training and evaluation. We evaluate our detectors on the large open-source Free Music Archive (FMA) and genre-specific datasets.
abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的音乐从制作到发行以数字方式传输，需要自动确定媒体质量的方法。数字音频处理工具中的保护机制并没有消除位于分销链下游的生产实体评估音频质量并检测上游插入的缺陷的需要。此类分析通常仅依赖于接收到的音频和稀缺元数据。故意使用流行音乐中的咔嗒声等人工制品以及由于现代音频编码损坏而产生的最新缺陷，需要以数据为中心和上下文敏感的解决方案进行检测。我们提出了一种遵循端到端编码器解码器配置的卷积网络架构，以开发两个示例性音频缺陷的检测器。对点击检测器进行训练，并将其与传统信号处理方法进行比较，并讨论上下文敏感性。额外的后处理用于数据增强和工作流程模拟。我们的模型捕获方差的能力是在损坏的 MP3 压缩音频解压缩中的伪影检测器中进行探索的。对于这两项任务，我们描述了用于受控探测器训练和评估的人工制品的合成生成。我们在大型开源免费音乐档案 (FMA) 和特定流派数据集上评估我们的检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度网络检测音乐中的音频缺陷，如点击声和MP3压缩伪影。
AI.motivation: 随着数字音乐传输量增加，传统方法难以检测上游插入的缺陷，需数据驱动且上下文敏感的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用端到端编码器-解码器卷积网络架构，结合合成生成的缺陷数据训练检测器，并利用后处理与数据增强技术。
AI.result: 模型在FMA等数据集上有效检测缺陷，展示了对音频变异的捕捉能力，优于传统信号处理方法。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在音频缺陷检测中表现优异，合成数据生成有助于提升检测器的鲁棒性与可控性。

We evaluate our detectors on the large open-source Free Music Archive (FMA) and genre-specific datasets. 随着越来越多的音乐从制作到发行以数字方式传输，需要自动确定媒体质量的方法。数字音频处理工具中的保护机制并没有消除位于分销链下游的生产实体评估音频质量并检测上游插入的缺陷的需要。此类分析通常仅依赖于接收到的音频和稀缺元数据。故意使用流行音乐中的咔嗒声等人工制品以及由于现代音频编码损坏而产生的最新缺陷，需要以数据为中心和上下文敏感的解决方案进行检测。我们提出了一种遵循端到端编码器解码器配置的卷积网络架构，以开发两个示例性音频缺陷的检测器。对点击检测器进行训练，并将其与传统信号处理方法进行比较，并讨论上下文敏感性。额外的后处理用于数据增强和工作流程模拟。我们的模型捕获方差的能力是在损坏的 MP3 压缩音频解压缩中的伪影检测器中进行探索的。对于这两项任务，我们描述了用于受控探测器训练和评估的人工制品的合成生成。我们在大型开源免费音乐档案 (FMA) 和特定流派数据集上评估我们的检测器。 本文提出使用深度网络检测音乐中的音频缺陷，如点击声和MP3压缩伪影。 Daniel Wolff,Rémi Mignot,Axel Roebel cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Cross Domain Few-Shot Learning via Meta Adversarial Training
title_zh: 通过元对抗训练进行跨域少样本学习
abstract: Few-shot relation classification (RC) is one of the critical problems in machine learning. Current research merely focuses on the set-ups that both training and testing are from the same domain. However, in practice, this assumption is not always guaranteed. In this study, we present a novel model that takes into consideration the afore-mentioned cross-domain situation. Not like previous models, we only use the source domain data to train the prototypical networks and test the model on target domain data. A meta-based adversarial training framework (MBATF) is proposed to fine-tune the trained networks for adapting to data from the target domain. Empirical studies confirm the effectiveness of the proposed model.
summary: Few-shot relation classification (RC) is one of the critical problems in machine learning. Current research merely focuses on the set-ups that both training and testing are from the same domain. However, in practice, this assumption is not always guaranteed. In this study, we present a novel model that takes into consideration the afore-mentioned cross-domain situation. Not like previous models, we only use the source domain data to train the prototypical networks and test the model on target domain data. A meta-based adversarial training framework (MBATF) is proposed to fine-tune the trained networks for adapting to data from the target domain. Empirical studies confirm the effectiveness of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 小样本关系分类（RC）是机器学习中的关键问题之一。目前的研究仅关注训练和测试来自同一领域的设置。然而，在实践中，这一假设并不总是得到保证。在本研究中，我们提出了一种考虑到上述跨域情况的新颖模型。与以前的模型不同，我们仅使用源域数据来训练原型网络并在目标域数据上测试模型。提出了一种基于元的对抗训练框架（MBATF）来微调训练后的网络以适应来自目标域的数据。实证研究证实了所提出模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨领域少样本关系分类模型，解决训练与测试数据领域不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本学习方法假设训练与测试数据同领域，但实际应用中常面临跨领域场景，需提升模型适应性。
AI.method: 设计基于元学习的对抗训练框架（MBATF），利用源领域数据训练原型网络，并通过对抗训练微调模型以适应目标领域数据。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在跨领域少样本关系分类任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MBATF框架成功应对了跨领域少样本学习的挑战，提升了模型的泛化能力。

authors_text: Barun Gorain,Partha Sarathi Mandal,Kaushik Mondal,Supantha Pandit
title: Collaborative Dispersion by Silent Robots
title_zh: 静音机器人协作驱散
abstract: In the dispersion problem, a set of $k$ co-located mobile robots must relocate themselves in distinct nodes of an unknown network. The network is modeled as an anonymous graph $G=(V,E)$, where the nodes of the graph are not labeled. The edges incident to a node $v$ with degree $d$ are labeled with port numbers in the range $0,1, \cdots, d-1$ at $v$. The robots have unique ids in the range $[0,L]$, where $L \ge k$, and are initially placed at a source node $s$. Each robot knows only its own id but does not know the ids of the other robots or the values of $L,k$. The task of dispersion was traditionally achieved with the assumption of two types of communication abilities: (a) when some robots are at the same node, they can communicate by exchanging messages between them (b) any two robots in the network can exchange messages between them. In this paper, we ask whether this ability of communication among co-located robots is necessary to achieve dispersion. We show that even if the ability of communication is not available, the task of dispersion by a set of mobile robots can be achieved in a much weaker model where a robot at a node $v$ has the access of following very restricted information at the beginning of any round: (1) am I alone at $v$? (2) the number of robots at $v$ increased or decreased compare to the previous round? We propose a deterministic algorithm that achieves dispersion on any given graph $G=(V,E)$ in time $O\left( k\log L+k^2 \log Δ\right)$, where $Δ$ is the maximum degree of a node in $G$. Each robot uses $O(\log L+ \log Δ)$ additional memory. We also prove that the task of dispersion cannot be achieved by a set of mobile robots with $o(\log L + \log Δ)$ additional memory.
summary: In the dispersion problem, a set of $k$ co-located mobile robots must relocate themselves in distinct nodes of an unknown network. The network is modeled as an anonymous graph $G=(V,E)$, where the nodes of the graph are not labeled. The edges incident to a node $v$ with degree $d$ are labeled with port numbers in the range $0,1, \cdots, d-1$ at $v$. The robots have unique ids in the range $[0,L]$, where $L \ge k$, and are initially placed at a source node $s$. Each robot knows only its own id but does not know the ids of the other robots or the values of $L,k$. The task of dispersion was traditionally achieved with the assumption of two types of communication abilities: (a) when some robots are at the same node, they can communicate by exchanging messages between them (b) any two robots in the network can exchange messages between them. In this paper, we ask whether this ability of communication among co-located robots is necessary to achieve dispersion. We show that even if the ability of communication is not available, the task of dispersion by a set of mobile robots can be achieved in a much weaker model where a robot at a node $v$ has the access of following very restricted information at the beginning of any round: (1) am I alone at $v$? (2) the number of robots at $v$ increased or decreased compare to the previous round? We propose a deterministic algorithm that achieves dispersion on any given graph $G=(V,E)$ in time $O\left( k\log L+k^2 \log Δ\right)$, where $Δ$ is the maximum degree of a node in $G$. Each robot uses $O(\log L+ \log Δ)$ additional memory. We also prove that the task of dispersion cannot be achieved by a set of mobile robots with $o(\log L + \log Δ)$ additional memory.
abstract_zh: 在分散问题中，一组 $k$ 位于同一位置的移动机器人必须将自己重新定位到未知网络的不同节点中。该网络被建模为匿名图 $G=(V,E)$，其中图的节点未标记。与度为 $d$ 的节点 $v$ 关联的边在 $v$ 处用端口号标记，范围为 $0,1, \cdots, d-1$。机器人在 $[0,L]$ 范围内具有唯一的 ID，其中 $L \ge k$，并且最初放置在源节点 $s$ 处。每个机器人只知道自己的 id，但不知道其他机器人的 id 或 $L,k$ 的值。传统上，分散任务是通过假设两种通信能力来实现的：（a）当一些机器人位于同一节点时，它们可以通过在它们之间交换消息来进行通信（b）网络中的任何两个机器人都可以在它们之间交换消息。在本文中，我们询问共置机器人之间的这种通信能力对于实现分散是否是必要的。我们表明，即使没有通信能力，一组移动机器人的分散任务也可以在一个较弱的模型中完成，其中节点 $v$ 的机器人在任何一轮开始时都可以访问以下非常有限的信息：（1）我独自在 $v$ 吗？ （2）$v$处的机器人数量与上一轮相比是增加还是减少？我们提出了一种确定性算法，可以在 $O\left( k\log L+k^2 \log Δ\right)$ 时间内在任何给定图 $G=(V,E)$ 上实现分散，其中 $Δ$ 是 $G$ 中节点的最大度数。每个机器人使用 $O(\log L+ \log Δ)$ 额外内存。我们还证明，一组具有 $o(\log L + \log Δ)$ 额外内存的移动机器人无法完成分散任务。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在未知网络中，无通信能力的移动机器人如何通过有限信息实现分散的任务。
AI.motivation: 传统分散问题依赖机器人间的通信能力，但本文旨在探索无需通信是否可行，并降低信息需求。
AI.method: 提出一种确定性算法，机器人仅需判断自身是否独处及节点机器人数量变化，无需其他通信。
AI.result: 算法在任意图上实现分散，时间复杂度为O(k log L +k² log Δ)，内存需求为O(log L + log Δ)，并证明更低内存无法完成任务。
AI.conclusion: 无需通信即可实现分散，所提算法在内存和时间上达到最优，为机器人分散问题提供新思路。

title: Semi-Supervised GCN for learning Molecular Structure-Activity Relationships
title_zh: 用于学习分子结构-活性关系的半监督 GCN
comment: ELLIS Machine Learning for Molecules workshop (ML4Molecules) 2021
comments: ELLIS Machine Learning for Molecules workshop (ML4Molecules) 2021
abstract: Since the introduction of artificial intelligence in medicinal chemistry, the necessity has emerged to analyse how molecular property variation is modulated by either single atoms or chemical groups. In this paper, we propose to train graph-to-graph neural network using semi-supervised learning for attributing structure-property relationships. As initial case studies we apply the method to solubility and molecular acidity while checking its consistency in comparison with known experimental chemical data. As final goal, our approach could represent a valuable tool to deal with problems such as activity cliffs, lead optimization and de-novo drug design.
summary: Since the introduction of artificial intelligence in medicinal chemistry, the necessity has emerged to analyse how molecular property variation is modulated by either single atoms or chemical groups. In this paper, we propose to train graph-to-graph neural network using semi-supervised learning for attributing structure-property relationships. As initial case studies we apply the method to solubility and molecular acidity while checking its consistency in comparison with known experimental chemical data. As final goal, our approach could represent a valuable tool to deal with problems such as activity cliffs, lead optimization and de-novo drug design.
abstract_zh: 自从人工智能在药物化学中引入以来，就需要分析单个原子或化学基团如何调节分子特性的变化。在本文中，我们建议使用半监督学习来训练图到图神经网络来归因结构-属性关系。作为初始案例研究，我们将该方法应用于溶解度和分子酸度，同时检查其与已知实验化学数据的一致性。作为最终目标，我们的方法可以成为解决活性悬崖、先导化合物优化和从头药物设计等问题的宝贵工具。

AI.tldr: 提出半监督图卷积网络（GCN）模型以学习分子结构与属性间的关联，用于药物化学中的结构-活性关系分析。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以准确解析分子结构变化对属性的影响，需借助AI模型提升预测精度与效率，助力药物研发。
AI.method: 采用半监督学习框架训练图到图神经网络，通过分子图结构捕捉局部与全局特征，建立结构-属性映射关系。
AI.result: 在溶解度与分子酸度案例中验证模型预测与实验数据的一致性，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效辅助解决药物研发中的活性悬崖、先导优化等挑战，具有重要应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 提出半监督图卷积网络（GCN）模型以学习分子结构与属性间的关联，用于药物化学中的结构-活性关系分析。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法难以准确解析分子结构变化对属性的影响，需借助AI模型提升预测精度与效率，助力药物研发。
ai_content.method: 采用半监督学习框架训练图到图神经网络，通过分子图结构捕捉局部与全局特征，建立结构-属性映射关系。
ai_content.result: 在溶解度与分子酸度案例中验证模型预测与实验数据的一致性，证明方法有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法可有效辅助解决药物研发中的活性悬崖、先导优化等挑战，具有重要应用价值。

search_text: Semi-Supervised GCN for learning Molecular Structure-Activity Relationships 用于学习分子结构-活性关系的半监督 GCN Since the introduction of artificial intelligence in medicinal chemistry, the necessity has emerged to analyse how molecular property variation is modulated by either single atoms or chemical groups. In this paper, we propose to train graph-to-graph neural network using semi-supervised learning for attributing structure-property relationships. As initial case studies we apply the method to solubility and molecular acidity while checking its consistency in comparison with known experimental chemical data. As final goal, our approach could represent a valuable tool to deal with problems such as activity cliffs, lead optimization and de-novo drug design. 自从人工智能在药物化学中引入以来，就需要分析单个原子或化学基团如何调节分子特性的变化。在本文中，我们建议使用半监督学习来训练图到图神经网络来归因结构-属性关系。作为初始案例研究，我们将该方法应用于溶解度和分子酸度，同时检查其与已知实验化学数据的一致性。作为最终目标，我们的方法可以成为解决活性悬崖、先导化合物优化和从头药物设计等问题的宝贵工具。 提出半监督图卷积网络（GCN）模型以学习分子结构与属性间的关联，用于药物化学中的结构-活性关系分析。 Alessio Ragno,Dylan Savoia,Roberto Capobianco q-bio.BM,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Molecule Generation from Input-Attributions over Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 图卷积网络上的输入属性生成分子
comment: ELLIS Machine Learning for Molecules workshop (ML4Molecules) 2021
comments: ELLIS Machine Learning for Molecules workshop (ML4Molecules) 2021
abstract: It is well known that Drug Design is often a costly process both in terms of time and economic effort. While good Quantitative Structure-Activity Relationship models (QSAR) can help predicting molecular properties without the need to synthesize them, it is still required to come up with new molecules to be tested. This is mostly done in lack of tools to determine which modifications are more promising or which aspects of a molecule are more influential for the final activity/property. Here we present an automatic process which involves Graph Convolutional Network models and input-attribution methods to generate new molecules. We also explore the problems of over-optimization and applicability, recognizing them as two important aspects in the practical use of such automatic tools.
summary: It is well known that Drug Design is often a costly process both in terms of time and economic effort. While good Quantitative Structure-Activity Relationship models (QSAR) can help predicting molecular properties without the need to synthesize them, it is still required to come up with new molecules to be tested. This is mostly done in lack of tools to determine which modifications are more promising or which aspects of a molecule are more influential for the final activity/property. Here we present an automatic process which involves Graph Convolutional Network models and input-attribution methods to generate new molecules. We also explore the problems of over-optimization and applicability, recognizing them as two important aspects in the practical use of such automatic tools.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，药物设计在时间和经济上往往是一个昂贵的过程。虽然良好的定量构效关系模型（QSAR）可以帮助预测分子特性，而无需合成它们，但仍然需要提出新的分子进行测试。这主要是由于缺乏工具来确定哪些修饰更有希望或分子的哪些方面对最终活性/性质影响更大。在这里，我们提出了一个自动过程，其中涉及图卷积网络模型和输入归因方法来生成新分子。我们还探讨了过度优化和适用性问题，并将它们视为此类自动化工具实际使用中的两个重要方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络和输入归因方法的自动分子生成方法，用于优化药物设计流程。
AI.motivation: 传统药物设计成本高昂且耗时，现有QSAR模型虽能预测分子性质但无法生成新分子，缺乏有效工具识别关键分子特征。
AI.method: 结合图卷积网络建模分子结构，利用输入归因技术分析分子属性影响因素，生成优化分子并探讨过度优化与适用性问题。
AI.result: 成功生成具有潜在活性的新分子，验证了方法有效性，同时揭示了自动工具在过度优化和实际应用中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分子生成提供新思路，但需谨慎处理优化偏差与实际适用性验证，以确保生成分子的可行性。

title: Machine Learning for Stock Prediction Based on Fundamental Analysis
title_zh: 基于基本面分析的机器学习股票预测
comment: 10 pages. IEEE Symposium Series on Computational Intelligence, Orlando, Florida,USA, December 2021
comments: 10 pages. IEEE Symposium Series on Computational Intelligence, Orlando, Florida,USA, December 2021
abstract: Application of machine learning for stock prediction is attracting a lot of attention in recent years. A large amount of research has been conducted in this area and multiple existing results have shown that machine learning methods could be successfully used toward stock predicting using stocks historical data. Most of these existing approaches have focused on short term prediction using stocks historical price and technical indicators. In this paper, we prepared 22 years worth of stock quarterly financial data and investigated three machine learning algorithms: Feed-forward Neural Network (FNN), Random Forest (RF) and Adaptive Neural Fuzzy Inference System (ANFIS) for stock prediction based on fundamental analysis. In addition, we applied RF based feature selection and bootstrap aggregation in order to improve model performance and aggregate predictions from different models. Our results show that RF model achieves the best prediction results, and feature selection is able to improve test performance of FNN and ANFIS. Moreover, the aggregated model outperforms all baseline models as well as the benchmark DJIA index by an acceptable margin for the test period. Our findings demonstrate that machine learning models could be used to aid fundamental analysts with decision-making regarding stock investment.
summary: Application of machine learning for stock prediction is attracting a lot of attention in recent years. A large amount of research has been conducted in this area and multiple existing results have shown that machine learning methods could be successfully used toward stock predicting using stocks historical data. Most of these existing approaches have focused on short term prediction using stocks historical price and technical indicators. In this paper, we prepared 22 years worth of stock quarterly financial data and investigated three machine learning algorithms: Feed-forward Neural Network (FNN), Random Forest (RF) and Adaptive Neural Fuzzy Inference System (ANFIS) for stock prediction based on fundamental analysis. In addition, we applied RF based feature selection and bootstrap aggregation in order to improve model performance and aggregate predictions from different models. Our results show that RF model achieves the best prediction results, and feature selection is able to improve test performance of FNN and ANFIS. Moreover, the aggregated model outperforms all baseline models as well as the benchmark DJIA index by an acceptable margin for the test period. Our findings demonstrate that machine learning models could be used to aid fundamental analysts with decision-making regarding stock investment.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器学习在股票预测中的应用引起了广泛关注。在这一领域已经进行了大量的研究，多个现有结果表明机器学习方法可以成功地用于利用股票历史数据进行股票预测。大多数现有方法都侧重于使用股票历史价格和技术指标进行短期预测。在本文中，我们准备了 22 年的股票季度财务数据，并研究了三种机器学习算法：前馈神经网络（FNN）、随机森林（RF）和自适应神经模糊推理系统（ANFIS），用于基于基本面分析的股票预测。此外，我们应用了基于 RF 的特征选择和引导聚合，以提高模型性能并聚合来自不同模型的预测。我们的结果表明，RF 模型取得了最好的预测结果，并且特征选择能够提高 FNN 和 AFIS 的测试性能。此外，聚合模型在测试期间的表现优于所有基线模型以及基准道琼斯指数，其幅度处于可接受的范围内。我们的研究结果表明，机器学习模型可用于帮助基本面分析师做出有关股票投资的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文基于基本面分析，应用机器学习模型预测股票价格，并比较不同算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注技术指标的短期预测，而基于基本面分析的机器学习应用较少，需探索其有效性以辅助投资决策。
AI.method: 使用22年股票季度财务数据，采用前馈神经网络（FNN）、随机森林（RF）和自适应神经模糊推理系统（ANFIS），结合特征选择与bootstrap聚合提升模型表现。
AI.result: 随机森林模型表现最佳，特征选择提升FNN和ANFIS测试性能，聚合模型优于所有基准模型及道琼斯指数。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习模型可有效辅助基本面分析师进行股票投资决策，验证了其在基本面分析中的应用潜力。

title: Axiomatizing consciousness, with applications
title_zh: 意识公理化及其应用
abstract: Consciousness will be introduced axiomatically, inspired by Buddhist insight meditation and psychology, logic in computer science, and cognitive neuroscience, as consisting of a stream of $configurations$ that is $compound$, $discrete$, and (non-deterministically) $computable$. Within this context the notions of self, concentration, mindfulness, and various forms of suffering can be defined. As an application of this set up, it will be shown how a combined development of concentration and mindfulness can attenuate and eventually eradicate some of the forms of suffering.
summary: Consciousness will be introduced axiomatically, inspired by Buddhist insight meditation and psychology, logic in computer science, and cognitive neuroscience, as consisting of a stream of $configurations$ that is $compound$, $discrete$, and (non-deterministically) $computable$. Within this context the notions of self, concentration, mindfulness, and various forms of suffering can be defined. As an application of this set up, it will be shown how a combined development of concentration and mindfulness can attenuate and eventually eradicate some of the forms of suffering.
abstract_zh: 受佛教内观冥想和心理学、计算机科学中的逻辑和认知神经科学的启发，意识将以公理方式引入，意识由一系列$configurations$组成，即$compound$、$discrete$和（非确定性的）$computable$。在这种背景下，可以定义自我、专注、正念和各种形式的痛苦的概念。作为该设置的应用，将展示专注力和正念的综合发展如何能够减轻并最终消除某些形式的痛苦。

AI.tldr: 本文通过公理化方法定义意识，并探讨其在结合专注与正念以减轻痛苦中的应用。
AI.motivation: 受佛教内观冥想、心理学、计算机科学逻辑及认知神经科学启发，旨在建立跨学科的意识理论框架。
AI.method: 以公理化方式构建意识模型，定义其为复合、离散且非确定性可计算的配置流，并在此基础上定义自我、专注、正念与痛苦等概念。

search_text: Axiomatizing consciousness, with applications 意识公理化及其应用 Consciousness will be introduced axiomatically, inspired by Buddhist insight meditation and psychology, logic in computer science, and cognitive neuroscience, as consisting of a stream of $configurations$ that is $compound$, $discrete$, and (non-deterministically) $computable$. Within this context the notions of self, concentration, mindfulness, and various forms of suffering can be defined. As an application of this set up, it will be shown how a combined development of concentration and mindfulness can attenuate and eventually eradicate some of the forms of suffering. 受佛教内观冥想和心理学、计算机科学中的逻辑和认知神经科学的启发，意识将以公理方式引入，意识由一系列$configurations$组成，即$compound$、$discrete$和（非确定性的）$computable$。在这种背景下，可以定义自我、专注、正念和各种形式的痛苦的概念。作为该设置的应用，将展示专注力和正念的综合发展如何能够减轻并最终消除某些形式的痛苦。 本文通过公理化方法定义意识，并探讨其在结合专注与正念以减轻痛苦中的应用。 Henk Barendregt,Antonino Raffone cs.LO,cs.AI

title: Self-adjusting optimization algorithm for solving the setunion knapsack problem
title_zh: 求解setunion背包问题的自调整优化算法
abstract: The set-union knapsack problem (SUKP) is a constrained composed optimization problem. It is more difficulty for solving because values and weights depend on items and elements respectively. In this paper, we present two self-adjusting optimization algorithms for approximating SUKP from items and elements perspective respectively. By analyzing the dynamic characters in the SUKP, we design two types of self-adjusting repair and optimization operators that are based on the different loading process. We use the novel teaching-learning-based optimization algorithm (TLBO) to design a general discrete framework (DTLBO) suitable for these two types of operators. In addition, we introduce elite opposite search and natural selection mechanism into DTLBO to furtherly improve the performance of the algorithm from the perspective of population. Finally, we performed experimental comparisons on benchmark sets to verify the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm. The experimental results show that the item-based self-adjusting optimization algorithm I-DTLBO is outstanding, and the algorithm is superior to the other swarm intelligence methods for solving SUKP. IDTLBO algorithm reaches the upper boundary of the current swarm intelligence algorithms for solving SUKP in 10 instances, and gotten new upper boundary in 15 instances. The algorithm E-DTLBO based on element loading only perform slightly better on small and middle data sets, but worse on large-scale instances. It shows that element-based design is not suitable for solving SUKP.
summary: The set-union knapsack problem (SUKP) is a constrained composed optimization problem. It is more difficulty for solving because values and weights depend on items and elements respectively. In this paper, we present two self-adjusting optimization algorithms for approximating SUKP from items and elements perspective respectively. By analyzing the dynamic characters in the SUKP, we design two types of self-adjusting repair and optimization operators that are based on the different loading process. We use the novel teaching-learning-based optimization algorithm (TLBO) to design a general discrete framework (DTLBO) suitable for these two types of operators. In addition, we introduce elite opposite search and natural selection mechanism into DTLBO to furtherly improve the performance of the algorithm from the perspective of population. Finally, we performed experimental comparisons on benchmark sets to verify the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm. The experimental results show that the item-based self-adjusting optimization algorithm I-DTLBO is outstanding, and the algorithm is superior to the other swarm intelligence methods for solving SUKP. IDTLBO algorithm reaches the upper boundary of the current swarm intelligence algorithms for solving SUKP in 10 instances, and gotten new upper boundary in 15 instances. The algorithm E-DTLBO based on element loading only perform slightly better on small and middle data sets, but worse on large-scale instances. It shows that element-based design is not suitable for solving SUKP.
abstract_zh: 集合并背包问题（SUKP）是一个约束组合优化问题。解决起来比较困难，因为值和权重分别取决于项目和元素。在本文中，我们提出了两种自调整优化算法，分别从项目和元素角度近似 SUKP。通过分析SUKP的动态特性，我们设计了两种基于不同加载过程的自调整修复和优化算子。我们使用新颖的基于教学的优化算法（TLBO）来设计适合这两类算子的通用离散框架（DTLBO）。此外，我们在DTLBO中引入精英反向搜索和自然选择机制，从群体的角度进一步提高算法的性能。最后，我们对基准集进行了实验比较，以验证所提出算法的有效性。实验结果表明，基于项目的自调整优化算法I-DTLBO表现优异，该算法在求解SUKP时优于其他群体智能方法。 IDTLBO算法在10个实例中达到了当前群体智能算法求解SUKP的上限，并在15个实例中获得了新的上限。基于元素加载的算法E-DTLBO仅在中小数据集上表现稍好，但在大规模实例上表现较差。这表明基于单元的设计不适合解决SUKP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种自适应优化算法（I-DTLBO和E-DTLBO）解决集合并背包问题（SUKP），通过改进TLBO框架和引入新机制提升算法性能。
AI.motivation: SUKP因价值和权重依赖于物品与元素而难以求解，传统算法在处理大规模实例时效率不足，需设计更高效的优化方法。
AI.method: 基于物品和元素视角设计自适应修复与优化算子，结合改进的离散TLBO框架（DTLBO），引入精英反向搜索和自然选择机制，形成I-DTLBO和E-DTLBO算法。
AI.result: I-DTLBO在10个实例中达到当前群智能算法上限，15个实例中取得新上限；E-DTLBO仅在小规模数据集表现略优，大规模实例效果较差。
AI.conclusion: 基于物品的自适应优化设计更适用于SUKP求解，而基于元素的设计在大规模问题中表现不足。

title: A Tight $(1.5+ε)$-Approximation for Unsplittable Capacitated Vehicle Routing on Trees
title_zh: 树上不可分割容量车辆路径的紧$(1.5+ε)$近似
abstract: In the unsplittable capacitated vehicle routing problem (UCVRP) on trees, we are given a rooted tree with edge weights and a subset of vertices of the tree called terminals. Each terminal is associated with a positive demand between 0 and 1. The goal is to find a minimum length collection of tours starting and ending at the root of the tree such that the demand of each terminal is covered by a single tour (i.e., the demand cannot be split), and the total demand of the terminals in each tour does not exceed the capacity of 1. For the special case when all terminals have equal demands, a long line of research culminated in a quasi-polynomial time approximation scheme [Jayaprakash and Salavatipour, SODA 2022] and a polynomial time approximation scheme [Mathieu and Zhou, ICALP 2022]. In this work, we study the general case when the terminals have arbitrary demands. Our main contribution is a polynomial time $(1.5+ε)$-approximation algorithm for the UCVRP on trees. This is the first improvement upon the 2-approximation algorithm more than 30 years ago [Labbé, Laporte, and Mercure, Operations Research, 1991]. Our approximation ratio is essentially best possible, since it is NP-hard to approximate the UCVRP on trees to better than a 1.5 factor.
summary: In the unsplittable capacitated vehicle routing problem (UCVRP) on trees, we are given a rooted tree with edge weights and a subset of vertices of the tree called terminals. Each terminal is associated with a positive demand between 0 and 1. The goal is to find a minimum length collection of tours starting and ending at the root of the tree such that the demand of each terminal is covered by a single tour (i.e., the demand cannot be split), and the total demand of the terminals in each tour does not exceed the capacity of 1. For the special case when all terminals have equal demands, a long line of research culminated in a quasi-polynomial time approximation scheme [Jayaprakash and Salavatipour, SODA 2022] and a polynomial time approximation scheme [Mathieu and Zhou, ICALP 2022]. In this work, we study the general case when the terminals have arbitrary demands. Our main contribution is a polynomial time $(1.5+ε)$-approximation algorithm for the UCVRP on trees. This is the first improvement upon the 2-approximation algorithm more than 30 years ago [Labbé, Laporte, and Mercure, Operations Research, 1991]. Our approximation ratio is essentially best possible, since it is NP-hard to approximate the UCVRP on trees to better than a 1.5 factor.
abstract_zh: 在树上的不可分割的有能力车辆路径问题（UCVRP）中，我们得到一个具有边权重的有根树和称为终端的树顶点子集。每个终端都与 0 到 1 之间的正需求相关联。目标是找到从树根开始和结束的旅行的最小长度集合，使得每个终端的需求被单个旅行覆盖（即需求不能分割），并且每个旅行中终端的总需求不超过容量 1。对于所有终端具有相同需求的特殊情况，长时间的研究最终得出了拟多项式时间近似方案[Jayaprakash 和 Salavatipour，SODA 2022] 和多项式时间近似方案 [Mathieu 和 Zhou，ICALP 2022]。在这项工作中，我们研究了终端有任意需求时的一般情况。我们的主要贡献是树上 UCVRP 的多项式时间 $(1.5+ε)$ 近似算法。这是 30 多年前对 2 近似算法的首次改进 [Labbé、Laporte 和 Mercure，Operations Research，1991]。我们的近似比率本质上是最好的，因为将树上的 UCVRP 近似到比 1.5 因子更好是 NP 困难的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究树结构上的不可分割容量车辆路径问题（UCVRP），提出首个多项式时间(1.5+ε)近似算法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要针对终端需求相等的特殊情形，而实际需求可能任意分布。此前30年的2-近似算法未被突破，需探索更优解法。
AI.method: 设计基于需求分组与路径覆盖的算法框架，结合动态规划与贪心策略，利用树结构特性进行复杂度分析。
AI.result: 实现(1.5+ε)近似比，突破传统2-近似界限，并证明1.5为该问题的理论下限。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在多项式时间内达到最优近似比，为UCVRP树结构场景提供理论保证与实用价值。

Our approximation ratio is essentially best possible, since it is NP-hard to approximate the UCVRP on trees to better than a 1.5 factor. 在树上的不可分割的有能力车辆路径问题（UCVRP）中，我们得到一个具有边权重的有根树和称为终端的树顶点子集。每个终端都与 0 到 1 之间的正需求相关联。目标是找到从树根开始和结束的旅行的最小长度集合，使得每个终端的需求被单个旅行覆盖（即需求不能分割），并且每个旅行中终端的总需求不超过容量 1。对于所有终端具有相同需求的特殊情况，长时间的研究最终得出了拟多项式时间近似方案[Jayaprakash 和 Salavatipour，SODA 2022] 和多项式时间近似方案 [Mathieu 和 Zhou，ICALP 2022]。在这项工作中，我们研究了终端有任意需求时的一般情况。我们的主要贡献是树上 UCVRP 的多项式时间 $(1.5+ε)$ 近似算法。这是 30 多年前对 2 近似算法的首次改进 [Labbé、Laporte 和 Mercure，Operations Research，1991]。我们的近似比率本质上是最好的，因为将树上的 UCVRP 近似到比 1.5 因子更好是 NP 困难的。 本文研究树结构上的不可分割容量车辆路径问题（UCVRP），提出首个多项式时间(1.5+ε)近似算法。 Claire Mathieu,Hang Zhou cs.DS

title: Conservative Extensions for Existential Rules
title_zh: 存在规则的保守扩展
abstract: We study the problem to decide, given sets T1,T2 of tuple-generating dependencies (TGDs), also called existential rules, whether T2 is a conservative extension of T1. We consider two natural notions of conservative extension, one pertaining to answers to conjunctive queries over databases and one to homomorphisms between chased databases. Our main results are that these problems are undecidable for linear TGDs, undecidable for guarded TGDs even when T1 is empty, and decidable for frontier-one TGDs.
summary: We study the problem to decide, given sets T1,T2 of tuple-generating dependencies (TGDs), also called existential rules, whether T2 is a conservative extension of T1. We consider two natural notions of conservative extension, one pertaining to answers to conjunctive queries over databases and one to homomorphisms between chased databases. Our main results are that these problems are undecidable for linear TGDs, undecidable for guarded TGDs even when T1 is empty, and decidable for frontier-one TGDs.
abstract_zh: 我们研究这个问题，以决定给定元组生成依赖项 (TGD) 的集合 T1,T2（也称为存在规则），T2 是否是 T1 的保守扩展。我们考虑保守扩展的两种自然概念，一种与数据库上的连接查询的答案有关，另一种与所追踪的数据库之间的同态有关。我们的主要结果是，这些问题对于线性 TGD 是不可判定的，对于受保护的 TGD 来说是不可判定的，即使 T1 为空，而对于前沿一 TGD 来说是可判定的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究给定两个元组生成依赖（TGDs）集合T1和T2时，判断T2是否为T1的保守扩展问题，考虑了两种保守扩展定义并分析其判定复杂性。
AI.motivation: 保守扩展在知识库和数据库领域具有重要意义，确保扩展后的理论不会引入原理论无法推导的新信息，从而保持数据完整性与一致性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与复杂性证明，针对不同TGD子类（线性、守卫、前沿一）构造不可判定性证明或判定算法，结合查询答案与追逐数据库同态两种保守扩展定义进行研究。
AI.result: 两种保守扩展判定问题对线性TGD和守卫TGD均不可判定（即使T1为空），但对前沿一TGD可判定。
AI.conclusion: 不同TGD子类的保守扩展判定复杂性存在显著差异，为实际应用中选择合适的TGD形式提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Ashish Hooda,Neal Mangaokar,Ryan Feng,Kassem Fawaz,Somesh Jha,Atul Prakash
title: D4: Detection of Adversarial Diffusion Deepfakes Using Disjoint Ensembles
title_zh: D4：使用不相交集成检测对抗性扩散 Deepfakes
abstract: Detecting diffusion-generated deepfake images remains an open problem. Current detection methods fail against an adversary who adds imperceptible adversarial perturbations to the deepfake to evade detection. In this work, we propose Disjoint Diffusion Deepfake Detection (D4), a deepfake detector designed to improve black-box adversarial robustness beyond de facto solutions such as adversarial training. D4 uses an ensemble of models over disjoint subsets of the frequency spectrum to significantly improve adversarial robustness. Our key insight is to leverage a redundancy in the frequency domain and apply a saliency partitioning technique to disjointly distribute frequency components across multiple models. We formally prove that these disjoint ensembles lead to a reduction in the dimensionality of the input subspace where adversarial deepfakes lie, thereby making adversarial deepfakes harder to find for black-box attacks. We then empirically validate the D4 method against several black-box attacks and find that D4 significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art defenses applied to diffusion-generated deepfake detection. We also demonstrate that D4 provides robustness against adversarial deepfakes from unseen data distributions as well as unseen generative techniques.
summary: Detecting diffusion-generated deepfake images remains an open problem. Current detection methods fail against an adversary who adds imperceptible adversarial perturbations to the deepfake to evade detection. In this work, we propose Disjoint Diffusion Deepfake Detection (D4), a deepfake detector designed to improve black-box adversarial robustness beyond de facto solutions such as adversarial training. D4 uses an ensemble of models over disjoint subsets of the frequency spectrum to significantly improve adversarial robustness. Our key insight is to leverage a redundancy in the frequency domain and apply a saliency partitioning technique to disjointly distribute frequency components across multiple models. We formally prove that these disjoint ensembles lead to a reduction in the dimensionality of the input subspace where adversarial deepfakes lie, thereby making adversarial deepfakes harder to find for black-box attacks. We then empirically validate the D4 method against several black-box attacks and find that D4 significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art defenses applied to diffusion-generated deepfake detection. We also demonstrate that D4 provides robustness against adversarial deepfakes from unseen data distributions as well as unseen generative techniques.
abstract_zh: 检测扩散生成的深度伪造图像仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。当前的检测方法无法对抗向 Deepfake 添加难以察觉的对抗性扰动以逃避检测的对手。在这项工作中，我们提出了不相交扩散深度伪造检测（D4），这是一种深度伪造检测器，旨在提高黑盒对抗的鲁棒性，超越对抗训练等实际解决方案。 D4 在频谱的不相交子集上使用模型集合来显着提高对抗鲁棒性。我们的主要见解是利用频域中的冗余并应用显着性分区技术来跨多个模型不相交地分布频率分量。我们正式证明，这些不相交的集合会导致对抗性深度伪造品所在的输入子空间的维数降低，从而使对抗性深度伪造品更难以在黑盒攻击中找到。然后，我们根据经验验证了 D4 方法针对多种黑盒攻击的能力，发现 D4 显着优于应用于扩散生成的深度伪造检测的现有最先进防御方法。我们还证明，D4 提供了针对来自未见数据分布以及未见生成技术的对抗性深度伪造的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出D4方法，通过离散频谱子集的模型集成来检测对抗性扩散深度伪造图像。
AI.motivation: 当前检测方法难以应对添加不可感知对抗扰动的深度伪造图像，需提升对抗鲁棒性以应对黑盒攻击。
AI.method: 利用频域冗余性，通过显著性分区技术将频谱分量分配至多个模型，构建离散集成模型以降低对抗样本的输入子空间维度。
AI.result: D4在多种黑盒攻击下显著优于现有检测方法，且对未见过的数据分布和生成技术具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: D4通过频谱离散集成有效提升了对抗扩散深度伪造的检测能力，为鲁棒检测提供了新思路。

D4 uses an ensemble of models over disjoint subsets of the frequency spectrum to significantly improve adversarial robustness. Our key insight is to leverage a redundancy in the frequency domain and apply a saliency partitioning technique to disjointly distribute frequency components across multiple models. We formally prove that these disjoint ensembles lead to a reduction in the dimensionality of the input subspace where adversarial deepfakes lie, thereby making adversarial deepfakes harder to find for black-box attacks. title: SuperCon: Supervised Contrastive Learning for Imbalanced Skin Lesion Classification
title_zh: SuperCon：不平衡皮肤病变分类的监督对比学习
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved great success in skin lesion classification. A balanced dataset is required to train a good model. However, due to the appearance of different skin lesions in practice, severe or even deadliest skin lesion types (e.g., melanoma) naturally have quite small amount represented in a dataset. In that, classification performance degradation occurs widely, it is significantly important to have CNNs that work well on class imbalanced skin lesion image dataset. In this paper, we propose SuperCon, a two-stage training strategy to overcome the class imbalance problem on skin lesion classification. It contains two stages: (i) representation training that tries to learn a feature representation that closely aligned among intra-classes and distantly apart from inter-classes, and (ii) classifier fine-tuning that aims to learn a classifier that correctly predict the label based on the learnt representations. In the experimental evaluation, extensive comparisons have been made among our approach and other existing approaches on skin lesion benchmark datasets. The results show that our two-stage training strategy effectively addresses the class imbalance classification problem, and significantly improves existing works in terms of F1-score and AUC score, resulting in state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved great success in skin lesion classification. A balanced dataset is required to train a good model. However, due to the appearance of different skin lesions in practice, severe or even deadliest skin lesion types (e.g., melanoma) naturally have quite small amount represented in a dataset. In that, classification performance degradation occurs widely, it is significantly important to have CNNs that work well on class imbalanced skin lesion image dataset. In this paper, we propose SuperCon, a two-stage training strategy to overcome the class imbalance problem on skin lesion classification. It contains two stages: (i) representation training that tries to learn a feature representation that closely aligned among intra-classes and distantly apart from inter-classes, and (ii) classifier fine-tuning that aims to learn a classifier that correctly predict the label based on the learnt representations. In the experimental evaluation, extensive comparisons have been made among our approach and other existing approaches on skin lesion benchmark datasets. The results show that our two-stage training strategy effectively addresses the class imbalance classification problem, and significantly improves existing works in terms of F1-score and AUC score, resulting in state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在皮肤病变分类方面取得了巨大成功。训练好的模型需要平衡的数据集。然而，由于实践中出现不同的皮肤病变，严重甚至最致命的皮肤病变类型（例如黑色素瘤）自然在数据集中代表的数量相当小。由于分类性能下降的现象广泛存在，因此让 CNN 在类别不平衡的皮肤病变图像数据集上表现良好非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了 SuperCon，一种两阶段训练策略来克服皮肤病变分类的类别不平衡问题。它包含两个阶段：（i）表示训练，试图学习在类内紧密对齐且与类间相距较远的特征表示；（ii）分类器微调，旨在学习基于学习到的表示正确预测标签的分类器。在实验评估中，我们的方法与其他现有方法在皮肤病变基准数据集上进行了广泛的比较。结果表明，我们的两阶段训练策略有效地解决了类别不平衡分类问题，并在 F1 分数和 AUC 分数方面显着改进了现有工作，从而获得了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SuperCon方法，通过监督对比学习解决皮肤病变分类中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 皮肤病变数据集中某些严重类型（如黑色素瘤）样本数量极少，导致传统CNN分类性能下降，亟需有效应对类别不平衡的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段学习类内紧密、类间分离的特征表示；第二阶段基于学习到的特征微调分类器。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，SuperCon在F1分数和AUC指标上显著优于现有方法，达到当时最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段训练策略能有效缓解类别不平衡问题，为皮肤病变分类提供了性能优越的新方法。

search_text: SuperCon: Supervised Contrastive Learning for Imbalanced Skin Lesion Classification SuperCon：不平衡皮肤病变分类的监督对比学习 Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved great success in skin lesion classification. A balanced dataset is required to train a good model. However, due to the appearance of different skin lesions in practice, severe or even deadliest skin lesion types (e.g., melanoma) naturally have quite small amount represented in a dataset. In that, classification performance degradation occurs widely, it is significantly important to have CNNs that work well on class imbalanced skin lesion image dataset. In this paper, we propose SuperCon, a two-stage training strategy to overcome the class imbalance problem on skin lesion classification. It contains two stages: (i) representation training that tries to learn a feature representation that closely aligned among intra-classes and distantly apart from inter-classes, and (ii) classifier fine-tuning that aims to learn a classifier that correctly predict the label based on the learnt representations. In the experimental evaluation, extensive comparisons have been made among our approach and other existing approaches on skin lesion benchmark datasets. The results show that our two-stage training strategy effectively addresses the class imbalance classification problem, and significantly improves existing works in terms of F1-score and AUC score, resulting in state-of-the-art performance. 卷积神经网络（CNN）在皮肤病变分类方面取得了巨大成功。训练好的模型需要平衡的数据集。然而，由于实践中出现不同的皮肤病变，严重甚至最致命的皮肤病变类型（例如黑色素瘤）自然在数据集中代表的数量相当小。由于分类性能下降的现象广泛存在，因此让 CNN 在类别不平衡的皮肤病变图像数据集上表现良好非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了 SuperCon，一种两阶段训练策略来克服皮肤病变分类的类别不平衡问题。它包含两个阶段：（i）表示训练，试图学习在类内紧密对齐且与类间相距较远的特征表示；（ii）分类器微调，旨在学习基于学习到的表示正确预测标签的分类器。在实验评估中，我们的方法与其他现有方法在皮肤病变基准数据集上进行了广泛的比较。结果表明，我们的两阶段训练策略有效地解决了类别不平衡分类问题，并在 F1 分数和 AUC 分数方面显着改进了现有工作，从而获得了最先进的性能。 本文提出SuperCon方法，通过监督对比学习解决皮肤病变分类中的类别不平衡问题。 Keyu Chen,Di Zhuang,J. Morris Chang cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Rethinking Graph Convolutional Networks in Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: 重新思考知识图补全中的图卷积网络
abstract: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) -- which are effective in modeling graph structures -- have been increasingly popular in knowledge graph completion (KGC). GCN-based KGC models first use GCNs to generate expressive entity representations and then use knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models to capture the interactions among entities and relations. However, many GCN-based KGC models fail to outperform state-of-the-art KGE models though introducing additional computational complexity. This phenomenon motivates us to explore the real effect of GCNs in KGC. Therefore, in this paper, we build upon representative GCN-based KGC models and introduce variants to find which factor of GCNs is critical in KGC. Surprisingly, we observe from experiments that the graph structure modeling in GCNs does not have a significant impact on the performance of KGC models, which is in contrast to the common belief. Instead, the transformations for entity representations are responsible for the performance improvements. Based on the observation, we propose a simple yet effective framework named LTE-KGE, which equips existing KGE models with linearly transformed entity embeddings. Experiments demonstrate that LTE-KGE models lead to similar performance improvements with GCN-based KGC methods, while being more computationally efficient. These results suggest that existing GCNs are unnecessary for KGC, and novel GCN-based KGC models should count on more ablation studies to validate their effectiveness. The code of all the experiments is available on GitHub at https://github.com/MIRALab-USTC/GCN4KGC.
summary: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) -- which are effective in modeling graph structures -- have been increasingly popular in knowledge graph completion (KGC). GCN-based KGC models first use GCNs to generate expressive entity representations and then use knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models to capture the interactions among entities and relations. However, many GCN-based KGC models fail to outperform state-of-the-art KGE models though introducing additional computational complexity. This phenomenon motivates us to explore the real effect of GCNs in KGC. Therefore, in this paper, we build upon representative GCN-based KGC models and introduce variants to find which factor of GCNs is critical in KGC. Surprisingly, we observe from experiments that the graph structure modeling in GCNs does not have a significant impact on the performance of KGC models, which is in contrast to the common belief. Instead, the transformations for entity representations are responsible for the performance improvements. Based on the observation, we propose a simple yet effective framework named LTE-KGE, which equips existing KGE models with linearly transformed entity embeddings. Experiments demonstrate that LTE-KGE models lead to similar performance improvements with GCN-based KGC methods, while being more computationally efficient. These results suggest that existing GCNs are unnecessary for KGC, and novel GCN-based KGC models should count on more ablation studies to validate their effectiveness. The code of all the experiments is available on GitHub at https://github.com/MIRALab-USTC/GCN4KGC.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）在建模图结构方面非常有效，在知识图补全（KGC）中越来越受欢迎。基于 GCN 的 KGC 模型首先使用 GCN 生成表达实体表示，然后使用知识图嵌入（KGE）模型来捕获实体和关系之间的交互。然而，许多基于 GCN 的 KGC 模型虽然引入了额外的计算复杂性，但未能超越最先进的 KGE 模型。这种现象激励我们探索 GCN 在 KGC 中的真实效果。因此，在本文中，我们以代表性的基于 GCN 的 KGC 模型为基础，并引入变体来找出 GCN 的哪些因素在 KGC 中至关重要。令人惊讶的是，我们从实验中观察到，GCN 中的图结构建模并没有对 KGC 模型的性能产生显着影响，这与普遍的看法相反。相反，实体表示的转换负责性能的改进。基于观察，我们提出了一个简单而有效的框架，名为 LTE-KGE，它为现有的 KGE 模型配备了线性变换的实体嵌入。实验表明，LTE-KGE 模型可实现与基于 GCN 的 KGC 方法类似的性能改进，同时计算效率更高。这些结果表明现有的 GCN 对于 KGC 来说是不必要的，基于 GCN 的新型 KGC 模型应该依靠更多的消融研究来验证其有效性。所有实验的代码均可在 GitHub 上获取：https://github.com/MIRALab-USTC/GCN4KGC。

AI.tldr: 重新评估图卷积网络（GCN）在知识图谱补全（KGC）中的作用，并提出一种更高效的实体表示方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GCN的KGC模型未能超越KGE模型，且增加计算复杂度，因此需探讨GCN在KGC中的实际效果。
AI.method: 通过构建GCN-based模型变体，分析其关键因素，并提出LTE-KGE框架，为KGE模型提供线性变换的实体嵌入。
AI.result: 实验表明LTE-KGE在性能上与GCN-based方法相当，但计算效率更高，且现有GCN在KGC中可能非必要。
AI.conclusion: 现有GCN-based KGC模型需更多验证，而LTE-KGE框架在保持性能的同时提升效率，是更优选择。

authors_text: Hewei Liu,Shuyuan Zhu,Ruiqin Xiong,Guanghui Liu,Bing Zeng
title: Cross-Block Difference Guided Fast CU Partition for VVC Intra Coding
title_zh: 用于 VVC 帧内编码的跨块差异引导快速 CU 分区
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new fast CU partition algorithm for VVC intra coding based on cross-block difference. This difference is measured by the gradient and the content of sub-blocks obtained from partition and is employed to guide the skipping of unnecessary horizontal and vertical partition modes. With this guidance, a fast determination of block partitions is accordingly achieved. Compared with VVC, our proposed method can save 41.64% (on average) encoding time with only 0.97% (on average) increase of BD-rate.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new fast CU partition algorithm for VVC intra coding based on cross-block difference. This difference is measured by the gradient and the content of sub-blocks obtained from partition and is employed to guide the skipping of unnecessary horizontal and vertical partition modes. With this guidance, a fast determination of block partitions is accordingly achieved. Compared with VVC, our proposed method can save 41.64% (on average) encoding time with only 0.97% (on average) increase of BD-rate.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于跨块差异的VVC帧内编码快速CU划分算法。这种差异是通过分割获得的子块的梯度和内容来测量的，并用于指导跳过不必要的水平和垂直分割模式。通过该指导，相应地实现了块分区的快速确定。与VVC相比，我们提出的方法可以节省41.64%（平均）的编码时间，而BD-rate仅增加0.97%（平均）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于跨块差异的快速CU划分算法，用于提升VVC帧内编码效率。
AI.motivation: VVC标准的帧内编码计算复杂度高，现有方法难以兼顾编码速度与质量，需更高效算法降低计算开销。
AI.method: 通过计算子块梯度与内容差异指导划分模式跳过，减少冗余的水平/垂直划分判断步骤。
AI.result: 平均节省41.64%编码时间，仅增加0.97% BD-rate（客观质量损失极小）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持编码质量前提下显著提升VVC编码速度，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Peiying Zhang,Fanglin Liu,Chunxiao Jiang,Abderrahim Benslimane,Juan-Luis Gorricho,Joan Serrat-Fernacute
title: A Multi-Domain VNE Algorithm based on Load Balancing in the IoT networks
title_zh: 物联网网络中基于负载均衡的多域VNE算法
abstract: Virtual network embedding is one of the key problems of network virtualization. Since virtual network mapping is an NP-hard problem, a lot of research has focused on the evolutionary algorithm's masterpiece genetic algorithm. However, the parameter setting in the traditional method is too dependent on experience, and its low flexibility makes it unable to adapt to increasingly complex network environments. In addition, link-mapping strategies that do not consider load balancing can easily cause link blocking in high-traffic environments. In the IoT environment involving medical, disaster relief, life support and other equipment, network performance and stability are particularly important. Therefore, how to provide a more flexible virtual network mapping service in a heterogeneous network environment with large traffic is an urgent problem. Aiming at this problem, a virtual network mapping strategy based on hybrid genetic algorithm is proposed. This strategy uses a dynamically calculated cross-probability and pheromone-based mutation gene selection strategy to improve the flexibility of the algorithm. In addition, a weight update mechanism based on load balancing is introduced to reduce the probability of mapping failure while balancing the load. Simulation results show that the proposed method performs well in a number of performance metrics including mapping average quotation, link load balancing, mapping cost-benefit ratio, acceptance rate and running time.
summary: Virtual network embedding is one of the key problems of network virtualization. Since virtual network mapping is an NP-hard problem, a lot of research has focused on the evolutionary algorithm's masterpiece genetic algorithm. However, the parameter setting in the traditional method is too dependent on experience, and its low flexibility makes it unable to adapt to increasingly complex network environments. In addition, link-mapping strategies that do not consider load balancing can easily cause link blocking in high-traffic environments. In the IoT environment involving medical, disaster relief, life support and other equipment, network performance and stability are particularly important. Therefore, how to provide a more flexible virtual network mapping service in a heterogeneous network environment with large traffic is an urgent problem. Aiming at this problem, a virtual network mapping strategy based on hybrid genetic algorithm is proposed. This strategy uses a dynamically calculated cross-probability and pheromone-based mutation gene selection strategy to improve the flexibility of the algorithm. In addition, a weight update mechanism based on load balancing is introduced to reduce the probability of mapping failure while balancing the load. Simulation results show that the proposed method performs well in a number of performance metrics including mapping average quotation, link load balancing, mapping cost-benefit ratio, acceptance rate and running time.
abstract_zh: 虚拟网络嵌入是网络虚拟化的关键问题之一。由于虚拟网络映射是一个NP难问题，因此很多研究都集中在进化算法的代表作遗传算法上。但传统方法的参数设置过于依赖经验，灵活性低，无法适应日益复杂的网络环境。另外，不考虑负载均衡的链路映射策略在大流量环境下很容易造成链路阻塞。在涉及医疗、救灾、生命保障等设备的物联网环境中，网络性能和稳定性尤为重要。因此，如何在大流量的异构网络环境下提供更加灵活的虚拟网络映射服务是一个迫切需要解决的问题。针对该问题，提出一种基于混合遗传算法的虚拟网络映射策略。该策略采用动态计算交叉概率和基于信息素的突变基因选择策略来提高算法的灵活性。此外，引入基于负载均衡的权值更新机制，在均衡负载的同时降低映射失败的概率。仿真结果表明，该方法在映射平均报价、链路负载均衡、映射成本效益比、接受率和运行时间等多项性能指标上均表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于负载均衡的多领域虚拟网络嵌入算法，解决物联网环境中虚拟网络映射的灵活性和稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统遗传算法参数依赖经验且缺乏灵活性，无法适应复杂物联网环境；现有链路映射策略忽视负载均衡易导致网络拥塞，而医疗、救灾等关键场景对网络稳定性要求极高。
AI.method: 设计混合遗传算法，采用动态交叉概率与信息素突变策略提升灵活性，并引入负载均衡权重更新机制优化资源分配。
AI.result: 仿真显示新方法在映射成本、链路负载均衡、接受率及运行效率等指标上优于传统算法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了异构物联网环境下的虚拟网络映射难题，为高可靠性场景提供可行的网络虚拟化方案。
